17.name: Power Word: Shield
17.description: Shields an ally for 15 sec, absorbing 0 damage.

53.name: Backstab
53.description:
Stab the target, causing [(107.31% of Attack Power) * ((Max(0, Min(90 - 10, 10)) * 11 + 260) / 370)] Physical damage. Damage increased by 20% when you are behind your target [Improved Backstab: and critical strikes apply Find Weakness for 10 sec].

Awards 1 combo point.

66.name: Invisibility
66.description: Turns you invisible over 3 sec, reducing threat each second. While invisible, you are untargetable by enemies. Lasts 20 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect.

99.name: Incapacitating Roar
99.description: Shift into Bear Form and invoke the spirit of Ursol to let loose a deafening roar, incapacitating all enemies within 10 yards for 3 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

100.name: Charge
100.description:
Charge to an enemy, dealing (21% of Attack Power) Physical damage, rooting it for 1 sec [Warbringer: and stunning it for until canceled].

Generates 20 Rage.

116.name: Frostbolt
116.description: Launches a bolt of frost at the enemy, causing (244.8% of Spell Power) Frost damage and slowing movement speed by 50% for 8 sec.

118.name: Polymorph
118.description:
Transforms the enemy into a sheep, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

120.name: Cone of Cold
120.description: Targets in a cone in front of you take (43.125% of Spell Power) Frost damage and have movement slowed by 50% for 8 sec.

122.name: Frost Nova
122.description: Blasts enemies within 12 yds of you for (5.149% of Spell Power) Frost damage and freezes them in place for 6 sec. Damage may interrupt the freeze effect.

126.name: Eye of Kilrogg
126.description: Summons an Eye of Kilrogg and binds your vision to it. The eye is stealthed and moves quickly but is very fragile.

130.name: Slow Fall
130.description: Slows a group member's falling speed for 30 sec.

133.name: Fireball
133.description: Throws a fiery ball that causes (388.125% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

136.name: Mend Pet
136.description: Heals your pet for 50% of its total health over 10 sec. [Wilderness Medicine: Each time Mend Pet heals your pet, it has a 25% chance to dispel a harmful magic effect from your pet]

172.name: Corruption
172.description: Corrupts the target, causing (35.0864% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and an additional (231.368% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 14 sec.

339.name: Entangling Roots
339.description: Roots the target in place for 30 sec. Damage may cancel the effect. [Incarnation: Tree of Life: Tree of Life: Instant cast.]

348.name: Immolate
348.description:
Burns the enemy, causing (93.5505% of Spell Power) Fire damage immediately and an additional (350.814% of Spell Power) Fire damage over 18 sec.

Periodic damage generates 1 Soul Shard Fragment and has a 50% chance to generate an additional 1 on critical strikes.

355.name: Taunt
355.description: Taunts the target to attack you, and increases the threat you generate against them by 800% for 6 sec.

370.name: Purge
370.description: Purges the enemy target, removing 1 beneficial Magic effect.[Successfully purging a target grants a stack of Maelstrom Weapon.]

408.name: Kidney Shot
408.description:
Finishing move that stuns the target. Lasts longer per combo point, up to 8 sec:
   1 point : 4 seconds
   2 points: 5 seconds
   3 points: 6 seconds
   4 points: 7 seconds
   5 points: 8 seconds

453.name: Mind Soothe
453.description: Soothes enemies in the target area, reducing the range at which they will detect you by 10 yards. Only affects Humanoid and Dragonkin targets. Does not cause threat. Lasts 20 sec.

465.name: Devotion Aura
465.description: Party and raid members within 40 yds are bolstered by their devotion, reducing damage taken by 3%.

475.name: Remove Curse
475.description: Removes all Curses from a friendly target.

498.name: Divine Protection
498.description: Reduces all damage you take by 20% for 8 sec. Usable while stunned.

527.name: Purify
527.description: Dispels harmful effects on the target, removing all Magic [Improved Purify: and Disease] effects.

528.name: Dispel Magic
528.description: Dispels Magic on the enemy target, removing 1 beneficial Magic effect.

585.name: Smite
585.description: Smites an enemy for (98.7% of Spell Power) Holy damage [Sanctuary: and absorbs the next [(Shadow spell power * 180 / 100) * (1 + Versatility)] damage dealt by the enemy] [Holy Fire: and has a 20% chance to reset the cooldown of Holy Fire].

586.name: Fade
586.description: Fade out, removing all your threat and reducing enemies' detection range against you for 10 sec.

589.name: Shadow Word: Pain
589.description:
Discipline,  Holy
A word of darkness that causes (16.8% of Spell Power) Shadow damage instantly, and an additional (99.68% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 16 sec.

 Shadow
A word of darkness that causes (16.8% of Spell Power) Shadow damage instantly, and an additional (99.68% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 16 sec.

Generates 3 Insanity.

596.name: Prayer of Healing
596.description: A powerful prayer that heals your target and 4 injured allies within 40 yards for (578.742% of Spell Power).

605.name: Mind Control
605.description: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 sec. Does not work versus Demonic, Undead, or Mechanical beings. Shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

633.name: Lay on Hands
633.description:
Heals a friendly target for an amount equal to 100% your maximum health.

Cannot be used on a target with Forbearance. Causes Forbearance for 30 sec.

642.name: Divine Shield
642.description:
Grants immunity to all damage, harmful effects, knockbacks and forced movement effects for 8 sec. 

Cannot be used if you have Forbearance. Causes Forbearance for 30 sec.

686.name: Shadow Bolt
686.description: Sends a shadowy bolt at the enemy, causing (174.096% of Spell Power) Shadow damage. [ Demonology: Generates 1 Soul Shard.]

698.name: Ritual of Summoning
698.description: Begins a ritual to create a summoning portal, requiring the caster and 2 allies to complete. This portal can be used to summon party and raid members.

702.name: Curse of Weakness
702.description:
Increases the time between an enemy's attacks by 20% for 2 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

703.name: Garrote
703.description:
Garrote the enemy, causing (406.35% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 18 sec.

Awards 1 combo point.

710.name: Banish
710.description: Banishes an enemy Demon, Aberration [Greater Banish: Undead], or Elemental, preventing any action for 30 sec. Limit 1. Casting Banish again on the target will cancel the effect.

740.name: Tranquility
740.description:
Heals all allies within 40 yards for [5 * (1019.92% of Spell Power)] over 6 sec. [Flourish: Extends the duration of all your heal over time effects by 2 sec every 1 sec]

Healing decreased beyond 5 targets.

768.name: Cat Form
768.description:
Shapeshift into Cat Form, increasing auto-attack damage by 40%, movement speed by 30%, granting protection from Polymorph effects, and reducing falling damage.

The act of shapeshifting frees you from movement impairing effects.

772.name: Rend
772.description: Lash out with your weapon, striking all targets within 10 yds for (259.248% of Attack Power) Physical damage instantly and wounding them for an additional (190.465% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 15 sec.

774.name: Rejuvenation
774.description: Heals the target for (321.2% of Spell Power) over 12 sec / Germination: 14 sec / Lingering Healing: 15 sec. [Germination: You can apply Rejuvenation twice to the same target] [Incarnation: Tree of Life: Tree of Life: Healing increased by 40% and Mana cost reduced by 30%.]

781.name: Disengage
781.description: Leap backwards [Posthaste: clearing movement impairing effects, and increasing your movement speed by 0% for 4 sec] [Narrow Escape: and activating a web trap which encases all targets within 8 yards in sticky webs, preventing movement for 8 sec].

783.name: Travel Form
783.description:
Shapeshift into a travel form appropriate to your current location, increasing movement speed on land, in water, or in the air, and granting protection from Polymorph effects.

The act of shapeshifting frees you from movement impairing effects.

845.name: Cleave
845.description: Strikes all enemies in front of you for (258.682% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

871.name: Shield Wall
871.description: Reduces all damage you take by 40% for 8 sec.

883.name: Call Pet 1
883.description: Summons your first pet to you.

974.name: Earth Shield
974.description:
Protects the target with an earthen shield, increasing your healing on them by 20% and healing them for [(73% of Spell Power) * (1.2)] when they take damage. This heal can only occur once every 3 sec. Maximum 9 charges.

 [Elemental Orbit: Earth Shield can only be placed on the Shaman and one other target at a time. The Shaman can have up to two Elemental Shields active on them / Earth Shield can only be placed on one target at a time. Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman.]

980.name: Agony
980.description:
Inflicts increasing agony on the target, causing up to [(7.76081% of Spell Power) * 18 / 2 * 8] Shadow damage over 18 sec. Damage starts low and increases over the duration. Refreshing Agony maintains its current damage level.

Agony damage sometimes generates 1 Soul Shard.

982.name: Revive Pet
982.description: Revives your pet, returning it to life with 100% of its base health.

1022.name: Blessing of Protection
1022.description:
Holy,  Retribution
Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to Physical damage and harmful effects for 10 sec.

Cannot be used on a target with Forbearance. Causes Forbearance for 30 sec.

 Protection
Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to Physical damage and harmful effects for 10 sec.

Cannot be used on a target with Forbearance. Causes Forbearance for 30 sec.

Shares a cooldown with Blessing of Spellwarding.

1044.name: Blessing of Freedom
1044.description: Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to movement impairing effects [Unbound Freedom: and increasing movement speed by 30%]for 8 sec.

1064.name: Chain Heal
1064.description: Heals the friendly target for (231% of Spell Power), then jumps up to 20 yards to heal the 3 most injured nearby allies. Healing is reduced by 30% with each jump.

1079.name: Rip
1079.description:
Finishing move that causes Bleed damage over time. Lasts longer per combo point.

   1 point  : [(62.26% of Attack Power) * 2 / 6] over 1 sec
   2 points: [(62.26% of Attack Power) * 3 / 6] over 2 sec
   3 points: [(62.26% of Attack Power) * 4 / 6] over 3 sec
   4 points: [(62.26% of Attack Power) * 5 / 6] over 3 sec
   5 points: [(62.26% of Attack Power) * 6 / 6] over 4 sec

1098.name: Subjugate Demon
1098.description: Subjugates the target demon up to level 22, forcing it to do your bidding for 10 min.

1122.name: Summon Infernal
1122.description:
Summons an Infernal from the Twisting Nether, impacting for (60% of Spell Power) Fire damage and stunning all enemies in the area for 2 sec.

The Infernal will serve you for 30 sec, dealing [(55% of Spell Power) * (100) / 100] damage to all nearby enemies every 2 sec and generating 1 Soul Shard Fragment every 1 sec.

1126.name: Mark of the Wild
1126.description:
Infuse a friendly target with the power of the wild, increasing their Versatility by 3% for 60 minutes.

If target is in your party or raid, all party and raid members will be affected.

1160.name: Demoralizing Shout
1160.description: [Morale Killer: Demoralizes all enemies within 10 yards, reducing the damage they do by 25% for 8 sec / Demoralizes all enemies within 10 yards, reducing the damage they deal to you by 20% for 8 sec.] [Booming Voice: Generates 0 Rage.]

1161.name: Challenging Shout
1161.description: Taunts all enemies within 10 yds to attack you for 6 sec, and increases the threat you generate against them by 800% for 6 sec.

1329.name: Mutilate
1329.description:
Attack with both weapons, dealing a total of [(115% of Attack Power) + (115% of Attack Power) * 0.5] Physical damage.

Awards 2 combo points.

1449.name: Arcane Explosion
1449.description: Causes an explosion of magic around the caster, dealing (61.76% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to all enemies within 10 yards. [ Arcane (Level 10): Generates 1 Arcane Charge if any targets are hit.]

1459.name: Arcane Intellect
1459.description:
Infuses the target with brilliance, increasing their Intellect by 3% for 1 hour.  

If the target is in your party or raid, all party and raid members will be affected.

1462.name: Beast Lore
1462.description: Gathers information about the target beast, displaying diet, abilities, specialization, whether or not the creature is tameable, and if it is exotic.

1464.name: Slam
1464.description: Slams an opponent, causing (303.485% of Attack Power) Physical damage. [Storm of Swords: Generates 10 Rage.]

1494.name: Track Beasts
1494.description: Shows the location of all nearby beasts on the minimap.

1513.name: Scare Beast
1513.description: Scares a beast, causing it to run in fear for up to 20 sec.  Damage caused may interrupt the effect.  Only one beast can be feared at a time.

1515.name: Tame Beast
1515.description:
Tames a beast to be your companion. If you lose the beast's attention for any reason, the taming process will fail.

You must dismiss any active beast companions and have an empty Call Pet slot before you can begin taming a new beast. Only Beast Mastery specialized Hunters can tame Exotic Beasts.

1543.name: Flare
1543.description: Exposes all hidden and invisible enemies within the targeted area for 20 sec.

1680.name: Whirlwind
1680.description: Unleashes a whirlwind of steel, [Fervor of Battle: hitting your primary target with Slam and]striking all nearby targets for [3 * (69.2956% of Attack Power)] Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

1706.name: Levitate
1706.description: Levitates a party or raid member for 10 min, floating a few feet above the ground, granting slow fall, and allowing travel over water.

1714.name: Curse of Tongues
1714.description:
Forces the target to speak in Demonic, increasing the casting time of all spells by 30% for 1 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

1715.name: Hamstring
1715.description: Maims the enemy for (15% of Attack Power) Physical damage, reducing movement speed by 50% for 15 sec.

1719.name: Recklessness
1719.description: Go berserk, increasing all Rage generation by 50% and granting your abilities 20% increased critical strike chance for 12 sec.

1725.name: Distract
1725.description: Throws a distraction, attracting the attention of all nearby monsters for 10 seconds. Usable while stealthed.

1752.name: Sinister Strike
1752.description:
Viciously strike an enemy, causing (89.424% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

Awards 1 combo point.

1766.name: Kick
1766.description: A quick kick that interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 6 sec.

1776.name: Gouge
1776.description:
Gouges the eyes of an enemy target, incapacitating for 4 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect.

Must be in front of your target.

Awards 1 combo points.

1784.name: Stealth
1784.description: Conceals you in the shadows until cancelled, allowing you to stalk enemies without being seen. [Shadow Focus: Abilities cost 10% less while stealthed] [Master of Subtlety: Attacks from Stealth and for 5 sec after deal 10% more damage]

1804.name: Pick Lock
1804.description: Allows opening of locked chests and doors that require a skill level of up to 90.

1822.name: Rake
1822.description:
Rake the target for (29.1% of Attack Power) Bleed damage and an additional (147% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 15 sec. [Infected Wounds: Reduces the target's movement speed by 20% for 12 sec]

Awards 1 combo point.

1833.name: Cheap Shot
1833.description:
Stuns the target for 6 sec.

Awards 1 combo point.

1850.name: Dash
1850.description: Shift into Cat Form and increase your movement speed by 60% while in Cat Form for 10 sec.

1856.name: Vanish
1856.description: Allows you to vanish from sight, entering stealth while in combat. For the first 3 sec after vanishing, damage and harmful effects received will not break stealth. Also breaks movement impairing effects.

1943.name: Rupture
1943.description:
Finishing move that tears open the target, dealing Bleed damage over time. Lasts longer per combo point.

   1 point  : [(67.3148% of Attack Power) * 2 / 6] over 8 sec
   2 points: [(67.3148% of Attack Power) * 3 / 6] over 12 sec
   3 points: [(67.3148% of Attack Power) * 4 / 6] over 16 sec
   4 points: [(67.3148% of Attack Power) * 5 / 6] over 20 sec
   5 points: [(67.3148% of Attack Power) * 6 / 6] over 24 sec
[   6 points: [(67.3148% of Attack Power) * 7 / 6] over 28 sec]
[   7 points: [(67.3148% of Attack Power) * 8 / 6] over 32 sec]

1953.name: Blink
1953.description: Teleports you forward 20 yds or until reaching an obstacle, and frees you from all stuns and bonds.

1966.name: Feint
1966.description: Performs an evasive maneuver, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 40% for 6 sec.

2050.name: Holy Word: Serenity
2050.description:
Perform a miracle, healing an ally for (1787.44% of Spell Power).

Cooldown reduced by 6 sec when you cast Flash Heal.

2061.name: Flash Heal
2061.description: A fast spell that heals an ally for (682% of Spell Power).

2094.name: Blind
2094.description: Blinds the target, causing it to wander disoriented for 1 min. Damage may interrupt the effect. Limit 1.

2096.name: Mind Vision
2096.description: Allows the caster to see through the target's eyes for 1 min. Will not work if the target is in another instance or on another continent.

2098.name: Dispatch
2098.description:
Finishing move that dispatches the enemy, dealing damage per combo point:
   1 point  : [(61.16% of Attack Power)] damage
   2 points: [(61.16% of Attack Power) * 2] damage
   3 points: [(61.16% of Attack Power) * 3] damage
   4 points: [(61.16% of Attack Power) * 4] damage
   5 points: [(61.16% of Attack Power) * 5] damage
[   6 points: [(61.16% of Attack Power) * 6] damage]
[   7 points: [(61.16% of Attack Power) * 7] damage]

2120.name: Flamestrike
2120.description:
Calls down a pillar of fire, burning all enemies within the area for (300% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

2139.name: Counterspell
2139.description: Counters the enemy's spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 7 sec.

2484.name: Earthbind Totem
2484.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 20 sec that slows the movement speed of enemies within 10 yards by 50%.

2565.name: Shield Block
2565.description: Raise your shield, blocking all melee attacks against you for 6 sec. [Mastery: Critical Block: These blocks can be critical blocks] [ Protection: Increases Shield Slam damage by 30% while active]

2637.name: Hibernate
2637.description: Forces the enemy target to sleep for up to 40 sec. Any damage will awaken the target. Only one target can be forced to hibernate at a time. Only works on Beasts and Dragonkin.

2641.name: Dismiss Pet
2641.description: Temporarily sends this pet away. You can call it back later.

2645.name: Ghost Wolf
2645.description: Turn into a Ghost Wolf, increasing movement speed by [Winds of Al'Akir: 30 / 30]% and preventing movement speed from being reduced below 100%.

2782.name: Remove Corruption
2782.description: Nullifies corrupting effects on the friendly target, removing all Curse and Poison effects.

2812.name: Denounce
2812.description: Casts down the enemy with a bolt of Holy Light, causing (762.96% of Spell Power) Holy damage and preventing the target from causing critical effects for the next 8 sec.

2818.name: Deadly Poison
2818.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy for [(11.374% of Attack Power) * 12 / 2] Nature damage over 12 sec. Subsequent poison applications will instantly deal (8.14% of Attack Power) Nature damage.

2823.name: Deadly Poison
2823.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy for [(11.374% of Attack Power) * 12 / 2] Nature damage over 12 sec. Subsequent poison applications will instantly deal (8.14% of Attack Power) Nature damage.

2825.name: Bloodlust
2825.description:
Increases haste by 30% for all party and raid members for 40 sec.

Allies receiving this effect will become Sated and unable to benefit from Bloodlust or Time Warp again for 10 min.

2908.name: Soothe
2908.description: Soothes the target, dispelling all enrage effects.

2948.name: Scorch
2948.description:
Scorches an enemy for (100% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

When cast on a target below 30% health, Scorch is a guaranteed critical strike.

Castable while moving.

2983.name: Sprint
2983.description: Increases your movement speed by 70% for 8 sec. Usable while stealthed. [Sprint: Allows you to run over water]

3408.name: Crippling Poison
3408.description: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy, slowing movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

3411.name: Intervene
3411.description: Run at high speed toward an ally, intercepting all melee and ranged attacks against them for 6 sec while they remain within 10 yds.

3714.name: Path of Frost
3714.description:
Activates a freezing aura for 10 min that creates ice beneath your feet, allowing party or raid members within 50 yards to walk on water.

Usable while mounted, but being attacked or damaged will cancel the effect.

4987.name: Cleanse
4987.description: Cleanses a friendly target, removing all [Improved Cleanse: Poison, Disease, and]Magic effects.

5116.name: Concussive Shot
5116.description:
Survival
Dazes the target, slowing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

 Beast Mastery
Dazes the target, slowing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

Cobra Shot will increase the duration of Concussive Shot on the target by 3.0 sec.

 Marksmanship
Dazes the target, slowing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

Steady Shot will increase the duration of Concussive Shot on the target by 3.0 sec.

5143.name: Arcane Missiles
5143.description:
Requires Clearcasting
Launches 5 waves of Arcane Missiles at the enemy over 2.5 sec, causing a total of [(4) * (107.8% of Spell Power)] Arcane damage.

5176.name: Wrath
5176.description: Hurl a ball of energy at the target, dealing (61.22% of Spell Power) Nature damage. [Incarnation: Tree of Life: Tree of Life: Damage increased by 20% and instant cast.]

5211.name: Mighty Bash
5211.description: Invokes the spirit of Ursoc to stun the target for 4 sec. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

5215.name: Prowl
5215.description: Shift into Cat Form and enter stealth.

5217.name: Tiger's Fury
5217.description: Instantly restores 50 Energy, and increases the damage of all your attacks by 15% for their full duration. Lasts 10 sec / Predator: 15 sec / Raging Fury: 15 sec.

5221.name: Shred
5221.description:
Shred the target, causing (215.3% of Attack Power) Physical damage to the target.

Awards 1 combo point.

5225.name: Track Humanoids
5225.description: Shows the location of all nearby humanoids on the minimap.

5246.name: Intimidating Shout
5246.description:
Causes the targeted enemy to cower in fear while all enemies within 8 yards flee from you and their movement speed is reduced by 70% for 8 sec.
Damage may cancel the effect.

5277.name: Evasion
5277.description: Increases your dodge chance by 100% for 10 sec.

5308.name: Execute
5308.description: Attempt to finish off a wounded foe, causing [(385.268% of Attack Power) + (385.268% of Attack Power)] Physical damage. Only usable on enemies that have less than 20% health. [Improved Execute: Generates 0 Rage.]

5374.name: Mutilate
5374.description:
Instantly attacks for (115% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

Awards 1 combo point.

5384.name: Feign Death
5384.description: Feign death, tricking enemies into ignoring you. Lasts up to 6 min.

5484.name: Howl of Terror
5484.description: Let loose a terrifying howl, causing 5 enemies within 10 yds to flee in fear, disorienting them for 20 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

5487.name: Bear Form
5487.description:
Shapeshift into Bear Form, increasing armor by 220% and Stamina by 25%, granting protection from Polymorph effects, and increasing threat generation.

The act of shapeshifting frees you from movement impairing effects.

5502.name: Sense Undead
5502.description: Shows the location of all nearby undead on the minimap until cancelled. Only one form of tracking can be active at a time.

5697.name: Unending Breath
5697.description: Allows an ally to breathe underwater and increases swim speed by 20% for 10 min.

5740.name: Rain of Fire
5740.description:
Calls down a rain of hellfire the target location, dealing [(45.9162% of Spell Power) * 8] Fire damage over 8 sec to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

5761.name: Numbing Poison
5761.description: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, clouding their mind and slowing their attack and casting speed by 15 / Master Poisoner: 18 / Master Poisoner: 18% for 10 sec.

5782.name: Fear
5782.description: Strikes fear in the enemy, disorienting for 20 sec. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

5784.name: Felsteed
5784.description: Summons a Felsteed, which serves as a mount.

5938.name: Shiv
5938.description:
Attack with your [Improved Shiv: poisoned blades / off-hand], dealing (125.4% of Attack Power)% Physical damage, dispelling all enrage effects and applying a concentrated form of your active Non-Lethal poison.

Awards 1 combo points.

6197.name: Eagle Eye
6197.description: Changes your viewpoint to the targeted location for 1 min. Only usable outdoors.

6201.name: Create Healthstone
6201.description: Creates a Healthstone that can be consumed to restore 25% health.

6343.name: Thunder Clap
6343.description:
Blasts all enemies within 8 yards for (235.68% of Attack Power) Physical damage [Thunderstruck: roots them for 4 sec] and reduces their movement speed by 20% for 10 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 / Recklessness: 8 / Crashing Thunder: 85 targets. [Rend: Inflicts Rend on all targets / 

If you know Rend, inflicts Rend on all targets.]
[
Generates 0 Rage.]

6353.name: Soul Fire
6353.description:
Burns the enemy's soul, dealing (2667.17% of Spell Power) Fire damage and applying Immolate.

Generates 1 Soul Shard.

6544.name: Heroic Leap
6544.description:
Protection
Leap through the air toward a target location, slamming down with destructive force to deal (23.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yards and resetting the remaining cooldown on Taunt.

 Arms,  Fury
Leap through the air toward a target location, slamming down with destructive force to deal (23.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yards.

6552.name: Pummel
6552.description: Pummels the target, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

6572.name: Revenge
6572.description:
Swing in a wide arc, dealing (234.72% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all enemies in front of you. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Your successful dodges and parries have a chance to make your next Revenge cost no Rage.

6673.name: Battle Shout
6673.description: Increases the attack power of all raid and party members within 100 yards by 5% for 1 hour.

6770.name: Sap
6770.description: Incapacitates a target not in combat for 1 min. Only works on Humanoids, Beasts, Demons, and Dragonkin. Damage will revive the target. Limit 1.

6789.name: Mortal Coil

Unleash a flurry of ice, striking the target 3 / Frigid Winds: 7 / Improved Flurry: 4 times for a total of [(128.52% of Spell Power) * 3 / Frigid Winds:  - 7 / Improved Flurry: 4] Frost damage.

Applies (3 / Frigid Winds:  - 7 / Improved Flurry: 4) stacks of Freezing.

45438.name: Ice Block
45438.description:
Encases you in a block of ice, protecting you from all attacks and damage for 10 sec, but during that time you cannot attack, move, or cast spells.

Causes Hypothermia, preventing you from recasting Ice Block for 30 sec.

45524.name: Chains of Ice
45524.description: Shackles the target with frozen chains, reducing movement speed by 70% for 8 sec.

46584.name: Raise Dead
46584.description: Raises [Sludge Belcher: an Abomination] [Glyph of the Geist: a Geist / a Ghoul] to fight by your side. You can have a maximum of one [Sludge Belcher: Abomination] [Glyph of the Geist: Geist / Ghoul] at a time.

46585.name: Raise Dead
46585.description: Raises a [Glyph of the Geist: geist / ghoul] to fight by your side.  You can have a maximum of one [Glyph of the Geist: geist / ghoul] at a time. Lasts 1 min.

46968.name: Shockwave
46968.description: Sends a wave of force in a frontal cone, causing (20% of Attack Power) damage and stunning all enemies within 10 yards for 2 sec.

47476.name: Strangulate
47476.description: Shadowy tendrils constrict an enemy's throat, silencing them for 4 sec.

47528.name: Mind Freeze
47528.description: Smash the target's mind with cold, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

47540.name: Penance
47540.description:
Launches a volley of holy light at the target, causing [(81.09% of Spell Power) * 1 * 1 * (3 + 0 + 0)] Holy damage to an enemy or [(348.84% of Spell Power) * 1 * (3 + 0 + 0)] healing to an ally over 2 sec. Castable while moving.

When you heal with Penance, everyone with your Atonement is healed for (18.72% of Spell Power).

47541.name: Death Coil
47541.description:
Fires a blast of unholy energy at the target, causing (211.812% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to an enemy or healing an Undead ally for (463.75% of Attack Power) health.

Extends the duration of Dread Plague and Virulent Plague by 1.5 sec.

47568.name: Empower Rune Weapon
47568.description: Drain the will of your enemy to empower your rune weapon, dealing (200% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and reduced damage to enemies nearby, gaining 40 Runic Power, and grants you Killing Machine.

47585.name: Dispersion
47585.description:
Disperse into pure shadow energy, reducing all damage taken by 75% for 6 sec and healing you for [(25 + 0) * (0 + 6) / 6]% of your maximum health over its duration, but you are unable to attack or cast spells.

Increases movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to all movement impairing effects.

Castable while stunned, feared, or silenced.

47788.name: Guardian Spirit
47788.description:
Calls upon a guardian spirit to watch over the friendly target for 10 sec, increasing healing received by 60%. If the target would die, the Spirit sacrifices itself and restores the target to 40% health.

Castable while stunned. Cannot save the target from massive damage.

48181.name: Haunt
48181.description:
A ghostly soul haunts a single target, dealing (720.612% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and increasing your damage dealt to the target by 12% for 18 sec.

 If the target dies, Haunt's cooldown is reset.

48265.name: Death's Advance
48265.description:
For 10 sec, your movement speed is increased by 35%, you cannot be slowed below 100% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks.

Passive: You cannot be slowed below 70% of normal speed.

48438.name: Wild Growth
48438.description: Heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for (254.87% of Spell Power) over 7 sec. Healing starts high and declines over the duration. [Incarnation: Tree of Life: Tree of Life: Affects 2 additional targets.]

48707.name: Anti-Magic Shell
48707.description: Surrounds you in an Anti-Magic Shell for 5 sec, absorbing up to [Total Health * 30 / 100 * (1 + Versatility) * 1 * 1] magic damage and preventing application of harmful magical effects. Damage absorbed generates Runic Power.

48743.name: Death Pact
48743.description: Create a death pact that heals you for 50% of your maximum health, but absorbs incoming healing equal to 30% of your max health for 15 sec.

48792.name: Icebound Fortitude
48792.description: Your blood freezes, granting immunity to Stun effects and reducing all damage you take by 30% for 8 sec.

49020.name: Obliterate
49020.description: A brutal attack [that deals [(118.441% of Attack Power)] Physical and [(118.441% of Attack Power)] Frost damage.][with both weapons that deals a total of [((80.008% of Attack Power) + (80.008% of Attack Power))] Physical and [((80.008% of Attack Power) + (80.008% of Attack Power))] Frost damage.]

49028.name: Dancing Rune Weapon
49028.description:
Summons a rune weapon for 8 sec that mirrors your melee attacks and bolsters your defenses.

While active, you gain 25% parry chance.

49039.name: Lichborne
49039.description: Draw upon unholy energy to become Undead for 10 sec, increasing Leech by 6% and making you immune to Charm, Fear, and Sleep.

49143.name: Frost Strike
49143.description: Chill your [weapon with icy power and quickly strike the enemy, dealing [(132.059% of Attack Power)] Frost damage.][weapons with icy power and quickly strike the enemy with both, dealing a total of [(92.8719% of Attack Power) + (92.8719% of Attack Power)] Frost damage.]

49184.name: Howling Blast
49184.description:
Blast the target with a frigid wind, dealing [(22.0356% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] [Northrend Winds: Frost damage and applying Frost Fever to the target / Frost damage to that foe, and reduced damage to all other enemies within 10 yards, infecting all targets with Frost Fever.]

 Frost Fever
A disease that deals [(171.2% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Frost damage over 24 sec and has a chance to grant the Death Knight 4 Runic Power each time it deals damage.

49360.name: Portal: Theramore
49360.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Theramore.

49361.name: Portal: Stonard
49361.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Stonard.

49576.name: Death Grip
49576.description:
Harnesses the energy that surrounds and binds all matter, drawing the target toward you [ Blood: and forcing the enemy to attack you]
[
The cooldown is increased by 10 sec in PvP Combat.]

49998.name: Death Strike
49998.description:
Blood,  Unholy
Focuses dark power into a strike that deals (153.12% of Attack Power) Physical damage and heals you for (20 / Voracious: 21 / Improved Death Strike: 32)% of all damage taken in the last 5 sec, minimum 7.0% of maximum health.

 Frost
Focuses dark power into a strike with both weapons, that deals a total of [(153.12% of Attack Power) + (29.835% of Attack Power)] Physical damage and heals you for (20 / Voracious: 21 / Improved Death Strike: 32)% of all damage taken in the last 5 sec, minimum 7.0% of maximum health.

50334.name: Berserk
50334.description: Go berserk for 15 sec, reducing the cooldowns of Mangle, Thrash, and Growl by 50% and the cooldown of Frenzied Regeneration by 100%.

50613.name: Arcane Torrent
50613.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 20 Runic Power.

50622.name: Bladestorm
50622.description: You become a whirling storm of destructive force, striking all nearby targets with your main hand weapon for (271.635% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

50842.name: Blood Boil
50842.description:
Deals (164% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and infects all enemies within 10 yds with Blood Plague.

 Blood Plague
A shadowy disease that drains 64 health from the target over 24 sec.

50977.name: Death Gate
50977.description:
Opens a gate which you can use to return to Ebon Hold.

Using a Death Gate while in Ebon Hold will return you back to near your departure point.

51052.name: Anti-Magic Zone
51052.description: Places an Anti-Magic Zone for 6 sec, reducing the magic damage taken by party or raid members by 15%.

51271.name: Pillar of Frost
51271.description: The power of frost increases your Strength by 30% for 12 sec.

51485.name: Earthgrab Totem
51485.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 20 sec. The totem pulses every 2 sec, rooting all enemies within 8 yards for 8 sec. Enemies previously rooted by the totem instead suffer 50% movement speed reduction.

51490.name: Thunderstorm
51490.description: Calls down a bolt of lightning, dealing (15.1503% of Spell Power) Nature damage to all enemies within 10 yards, reducing their movement speed by 40% for 5 sec, and knocking them [Thundershock: upward / away from the Shaman]. Usable while stunned.

51505.name: Lava Burst
51505.description: Hurls molten lava at the target, dealing (138.996% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Lava Burst will always critically strike if the target is affected by Flame Shock and its damage is increased by your critical strike chance.

51514.name: Hex
51514.description: Transforms the enemy into a frog for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

51690.name: Killing Spree
51690.description:
Finishing move that unleashes a barrage of gunfire, striking random enemies within 8 yards for Physical damage. Number of strikes increased per combo point.

Restores 1 combo point every 0.50 sec.

   1 point  : [((140% of Attack Power) + (140% of Attack Power)) * 2] over 0.50 sec
   2 points: [((140% of Attack Power) + (140% of Attack Power)) * 3] over 1.00 sec
   3 points: [((140% of Attack Power) + (140% of Attack Power)) * 4] over 1.50 sec
   4 points: [((140% of Attack Power) + (140% of Attack Power)) * 5] over 2.00 sec
   5 points: [((140% of Attack Power) + (140% of Attack Power)) * 6] over 2.50 sec
[   6 points: [((140% of Attack Power) + (140% of Attack Power)) * 7] over 3.00 sec]
[   7 points: [((140% of Attack Power) + (140% of Attack Power)) * 8] over 3.50 sec]

51723.name: Fan of Knives
51723.description:
Sprays knives at all enemies within 8 yards, dealing (105.88% of Attack Power) Physical damage and applying your active poisons at their normal rate. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Awards 1 combo point.

51886.name: Cleanse Spirit
51886.description: Removes all Curse effects from a friendly target.

52127.name: Water Shield
52127.description:
The caster is surrounded by globes of water, granting 69 mana per 5 sec. When a melee attack hits the caster, the caster regains [Surging Shields: 3 / 2]% of their mana. This effect can only occur once every 3 sec. 

 [Elemental Orbit: The Shaman can have up to two Elemental Shields active on them / Only one of your Elemental Shields can be active on you at once.]

52174.name: Heroic Leap
52174.description: Leap through the air toward a target location, slamming down with destructive force to deal (23.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yards [ Protection: and resetting the remaining cooldown on Taunt]

52212.name: Death and Decay
52212.description: Corrupts the ground targeted by the Death Knight, causing Shadow damage every sec that targets remain in the area for 10 sec.

53140.name: Teleport: Dalaran - Northrend
53140.description: Teleports you to Dalaran in Northrend.

53142.name: Portal: Dalaran - Northrend
53142.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Dalaran.

53351.name: Kill Shot
53351.description: You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing (700% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Only usable on enemies with less than 20% health.

53385.name: Divine Storm
53385.description:
Unleashes a whirl of divine energy, dealing [Burning Crusade: [(189.31% of Attack Power) * 1.05] Radiant / (189.31% of Attack Power) Holy] damage to all nearby enemies. 

Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

53480.name: Roar of Sacrifice
53480.description:
Instructs your pet to protect a friendly target, reducing their damage taken by 15%, but 50% of all damage taken by that target is transferred to your pet. 

Lasts 10 sec or until your pet's health drops below 25%.

53563.name: Beacon of Light
53563.description: Wrap a single ally in holy energy, causing your direct healing on other party or raid members to also heal that ally for 10% of the amount healed.

53595.name: Hammer of the Righteous
53595.description:
Hammers the current target for (150% of Attack Power)% Physical damage. [Consecration: Hammer of the Righteous also causes a wave of light that hits all other targets within 8 yds for (21% of Attack Power)% Holy damage] [While you are standing in your Consecration, Hammer of the Righteous also causes a wave of light that hits all other targets within 8 yds for (21% of Attack Power)% Holy damage]

Generates 1 Holy Power.

53600.name: Shield of the Righteous
53600.description:
Holy
Slams enemies in front of you with your shield, causing (95% of Attack Power) Holy damage, and increasing your Armor by (160 * $INT / 100) for 4.5 sec.

 Retribution
Slams enemies in front of you with your shield, causing (95% of Attack Power) Holy damage, and increasing your Armor by (160 * Strength / 100) for 4.5 sec.

 Protection

53652.name: Beacon of Light
53652.description: Wrap a single ally in holy energy, causing your direct healing on other party or raid members to also heal that ally for 10% of the amount healed.

55078.name: Blood Plague
55078.description: A shadowy disease that drains 64 health from the target over 24 sec.

55090.name: Scourge Strike
55090.description:
An unholy strike that deals (135% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and causing your plagues on the target to erupt, dealing their damage an additional time at 35% effectiveness.

Applies Virulent Plague or spreads it to a nearby enemy.

55095.name: Frost Fever
55095.description: A disease that deals [(171.2% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Frost damage over 24 sec and has a chance to grant the Death Knight 4 Runic Power each time it deals damage.

55233.name: Vampiric Blood
55233.description: Embrace your undeath, increasing your maximum health by 30% and increasing all healing and absorbs received by 30% for 10 sec.

55342.name: Mirror Image
55342.description:
Creates 3 copies of you nearby for 15 sec, which cast spells and attack your enemies. While active, you generate significantly reduced threat.

Taking direct damage will cause one of your images to dissipate

56222.name: Dark Command
56222.description: Command the target to attack you, and increases the threat you generate against them by 800% for 6 sec.

56641.name: Steady Shot
56641.description:
A steady shot that causes (320% of Attack Power) Physical damage. [ Marksmanship: Reduces the cooldown of Aimed Shot by 2.0 sec]

Usable while moving.

Generates 20 Focus.

56814.name: Detection
56814.description: Focus intently on trying to detect certain creatures.

57755.name: Heroic Throw
57755.description: Throws your weapon at the enemy, causing (35% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Generates high threat.

57934.name: Tricks of the Trade
57934.description: [Thick as Thieves: Increases the target's damage by 15%, and redirects / Redirects] all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next damaging attack within the next 30 sec and lasting 6 sec.

57994.name: Wind Shear
57994.description:
Elemental,  Enhancement,  Restoration
Disrupts the target's concentration with a burst of wind, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec.

58875.name: Spirit Walk
58875.description: Removes all movement impairing effects and increases your movement speed by 60% for 8 sec.

58984.name: Shadowmeld
58984.description: Activate to slip into the shadows, reducing the chance for enemies to detect your presence. Lasts until cancelled or upon moving. Any threat is restored versus enemies still in combat upon cancellation of this effect.

59542.name: Gift of the Naaru
59542.description: Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

59543.description: Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

60103.description:
Charges your off-hand weapon with lava and burns your target, dealing (207.58% of Attack Power) Fire damage.

Damage is increased by 100% if your offhand weapon is imbued with Flametongue Weapon. [Molten Assault: Lava Lash will spread Flame Shock from your target to 0 nearby targets] [Lashing Flames: Lava Lash increases the damage of Flame Shock on its target by 100% for 20 sec]

61025.name: Polymorph
61025.description:
Transforms the enemy into a harmless serpent, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

61295.name: Riptide
61295.description: Restorative waters wash over a friendly target, healing them for (480.288% of Spell Power) and an additional (239.057% of Spell Power) over 18 sec.

61305.name: Polymorph
61305.description:
Transforms the enemy into a harmless black cat, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

61336.name: Survival Instincts
61336.description: Reduces all damage you take by 50% for 6 sec.

61391.name: Typhoon
61391.description: Blasts targets within 15 yards in front of you with a violent Typhoon, knocking them back and reducing their movement speed by 50% for 6 sec. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

61648.name: Aspect of the Chameleon
61648.description: The Hunter takes on the aspect of a chameleon, becoming untrackable.

61721.name: Polymorph
61721.description:
Transforms the enemy into a harmless rabbit, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

61780.name: Polymorph
61780.description:
Transforms the enemy into a turkey, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

61882.name: Earthquake
61882.description:
Causes the earth within 8 yards of the target location to tremble and break, dealing [6 * (63.25% of Spell Power)] Nature damage over 6 sec and has a 5% chance to knock the enemy down. Multiple uses of Earthquake may overlap.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

62124.name: Hand of Reckoning
62124.description: Commands the attention of an enemy target, forcing them to attack you and increasing the threat you generate against them by 800% for 6 sec.

62618.name: Power Word: Barrier
62618.description: Summons a holy barrier to protect all allies at the target location for 10 sec, reducing all damage taken by 20% and preventing damage from delaying spellcasting.

64382.name: Shattering Throw
64382.description: Hurl your weapon at the enemy,  removing any magical immunities and causing (600% of Attack Power) Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

64843.name: Divine Hymn
64843.description:
Heals all party or raid members within 40 yards for [5 * (560.88% of Spell Power)] over 5 sec. Each heal increases all targets' healing taken by 4% for 15 sec, stacking.

Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

66235.name: Ardent Defender
66235.description:
Reduces all damage you take by 30% for 12 sec.

68992.name: Darkflight

69041.name: Rocket Barrage
69041.description: Launches your belt rockets at an enemy, dealing [(42.9% of Spell Power + 50% of Attack Power) + 90 * 2] fire damage.

69070.name: Rocket Jump

69179.name: Arcane Torrent

73325.name: Leap of Faith

73685.name: Unleash Life
73685.description:
Unleash elemental forces of Life, healing a friendly target for (609.991% of Spell Power).

Increases the healing of your next Riptide, Chain Heal, or Healing Wave by 25% and reduces its cast time by 30%.

73899.name: Primal Strike
73899.description: An instant weapon strike that causes (34% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

73920.name: Healing Rain
73920.description: Blanket the target area in healing rains, restoring [(90% of Spell Power) * 6 * 2 / 2] health to up to 5 allies over 18 sec.

77130.name: Purify Spirit
77130.description: Removes all Magic [Improved Purify Spirit: and Curse] effects from a friendly target.

77472.name: Healing Wave
77472.description: An efficient wave of healing energy that restores (1364.58% of Spell Power) of a friendly target’s health.

77478.name: Earthquake
77478.description:
Causes the earth within 8 yards of the target location to tremble and break, dealing [6 * (63.25% of Spell Power)] Nature damage over 6 sec and has a 5% chance to knock the enemy down. Multiple uses of Earthquake may overlap.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

77575.name: Outbreak
77575.description:
Inflicts the target with Dread Plague and Virulent Plague.

Dread Plague
A malicious plague that deals (439.11% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 24 sec. Explodes for (184.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to nearby enemies and infects one when the host dies. Can only be applied to 1 host at a time.

Virulent Plague
An infectious plague that spreads to all nearby enemies, dealing (200.35% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 24 sec.

77606.name: Dark Simulacrum
77606.description: Places a dark ward on an enemy player that persists for 12 sec, triggering when the enemy next spends mana on a spell, and allowing the Death Knight to unleash an exact duplicate of that spell.

77758.name: Thrash
77758.description:
Strikes all nearby enemies, dealing (95% of Attack Power) Bleed damage and an additional (32% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 15 sec. When applied from Bear Form, this effect can stack up to 3 times.

Generates 5 Rage.

78674.name: Starsurge
78674.description: Launch a surge of stellar energies at the target, dealing (344.74% of Spell Power) Astral damage.

78675.name: Solar Beam
78675.description: Summons a beam of solar light over an enemy target's location, interrupting the target and silencing all enemies within the beam. Lasts 8 sec.

79206.name: Spiritwalker's Grace
79206.description: Calls upon the guidance of the spirits for 15 sec, permitting movement while casting Shaman spells. Castable while casting.

80240.name: Havoc
80240.description: Marks a target with Havoc for 15 sec, causing your single target spells to also strike the Havoc victim for 60 / Gloom of Nathreza: 67 / Improved Havoc: 70% of the damage dealt.

80353.name: Time Warp

Allies will be unable to benefit from Bloodlust, Heroism, or Time Warp again for 10 min.

80483.name: Arcane Torrent
80483.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 15 of your Focus.

81269.name: Efflorescence

81297.name: Consecration
81297.description: Deals (5% of Attack Power) Holy damage every 1 sec to enemies within 8 yards.

82326.name: Holy Light
82326.description: A powerful but expensive spell, healing a friendly target for (3250% of Spell Power). [Tower of Radiance: Generates 1 Holy Power.]

83242.name: Call Pet 2

83243.name: Call Pet 3

83244.name: Call Pet 4

83245.name: Call Pet 5

84714.name: Frozen Orb
84714.description:
Launches an orb of swirling ice in front of you, dealing up to [20 * (67.584% of Spell Power)] Frost damage to all enemies it passes through over 15 sec. After a short delay, Frozen Orb will pursue its target. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Enemies damaged by the Frozen Orb are slowed by 50% for 8 sec.

85222.name: Light of Dawn

Generates 12 Rage.

85673.description: Calls down the Light to heal a friendly target for (415.8% of Spell Power).

85948.name: Festering Strike

Lesser Ghoul
A mindless servant of the Scourge, raised to obey its master's commands for 6 sec.

86392.name: Main Gauche
86392.description: Your main-hand attacks have a 30% chance to trigger an attack with your off-hand that deals (0.1% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

86659.name: Guardian of Ancient Kings

86678.name: Light of the Ancient Kings

86704.name: Ancient Fury
86704.description: Unleash the fury of ancient kings, causing (2.675% of Spell Power) Holy damage per application of Ancient Power, divided evenly among all targets within 10 yards.

88345.name: Portal: Tol Barad
