88346.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Tol Barad.

88423.name: Nature's Cure
88423.description: Cures harmful effects on the friendly target, removing all Magic [Improved Nature's Cure: Curse, and Poison] effects.

88625.name: Holy Word: Chastise
88625.description: Chastises the target for (385.749% of Spell Power) Holy damage and [Censure: stuns / incapacitates] them for [Censure: 4 sec / 4 sec]. [Serendipity: Cooldown reduced by 4 sec when you cast Smite or Holy Nova.]

88747.name: Wild Mushroom
88747.description:
Grow a magical mushroom at the target enemy's location. After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing (318.7% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (180% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.

Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

93322.name: Control Pet
93322.description: Allows you to give commands to control your pet.

93375.name: Control Demon
93375.description: Summons a Voidwalker under your command, able to withstand heavy punishment.

93402.name: Sunfire
93402.description:
Feral,  Guardian,  Restoration
A quick beam of solar light burns the enemy for (21.2% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (165.6% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 18 sec.

 Balance
A quick beam of solar light burns the enemy for (21.2% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (165.6% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 18 sec.

Generates 0 Astral Power.

94289.name: Protector of the Innocent
94289.description: Casting a targeted heal on any target, except yourself, also heals you for (5.39% of Spell Power).

96103.name: Raging Blow
96103.description:
A mighty blow with both weapons that deals a total of [(206.998% of Attack Power) + (206.998% of Attack Power)] Physical damage. [Improved Raging Blow: Raging Blow has a 25% chance to instantly reset its own cooldown]

Generates 12 Rage.

96231.name: Rebuke
96231.description: Interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

97462.name: Rallying Cry
97462.description:
Lets loose a rallying cry, granting all party or raid members within 40 yards 10% temporary and maximum health for 10 sec.

Health granted increased by 50% when not in a raid.

98008.name: Spirit Link Totem
98008.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 6 sec, which reduces damage taken by all party and raid members within 10 yards by 10%. Immediately and every 1 sec, the health of all affected players is redistributed evenly.

100780.name: Tiger Palm
100780.description: Strike with the palm of your hand, dealing (90% of Attack Power) Physical damage. [ Brewmaster: Reduces the remaining cooldown on your Brews by 1 sec /  Windwalker: Generates 0 Chi.]

100784.name: Blackout Kick
100784.description:
Windwalker
Kick with a blast of Chi energy, dealing [(84.7% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Physical damage.

 Mistweaver
Kick with a blast of Chi energy, dealing (84.7% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

 Brewmaster
Kick with a blast of Chi energy, dealing (84.7% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

101545.name: Flying Serpent Kick
101545.description:
Soar forward through the air at high speed for 1.5 sec.
 
If used again while active, you will land, reducing the movement speed of enemies within 8 yds by 70% for 4 sec.

101546.name: Spinning Crane Kick
101546.description:
Windwalker
Spin while kicking in the air, dealing [4 * (10% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Physical damage over 1.5 sec to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

 Brewmaster,  Mistweaver
Spin while kicking in the air, dealing [4 * (10% of Attack Power)] Physical damage over 1.5 sec to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

101643.name: Transcendence
101643.description: Split your body and spirit, leaving your spirit behind for 15 min. Use Transcendence: Transfer to swap locations with your spirit.

102342.name: Ironbark
102342.description: The target's skin becomes as tough as Ironwood, reducing damage taken by 20% for 12 sec.

102352.name: Cenarion Ward
102352.description: Heals the target for (132.72% of Spell Power) every 2 sec for 8 sec.

102359.name: Mass Entanglement
102359.description: Roots the target and all enemies within 12 yards in place for 10 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

102401.name: Wild Charge
102401.description: Fly to a nearby ally's position.

102543.name: Incarnation: Avatar of Ashamane
102543.description:
An improved Cat Form that grants all of your known Berserk effects and lasts 20 sec. You may shapeshift in and out of this improved Cat Form for its duration. During Incarnation:

Energy cost of all Cat Form abilities is reduced by 25%, and Prowl can be used once while in combat. [Berserk: Generate 1 combo point every 1.5 sec. Combo point generating abilities generate 1 additional combo point. Finishing moves restore up to 3 combo points generated over the cap.

All attack and ability damage is increased by 15%]

102547.name: Prowl
102547.description: Allows the Druid to vanish from sight, entering an improved stealth mode.  Lasts until cancelled.

102558.name: Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc
102558.description:
An improved Bear Form that grants the benefits of Berserk, causes Mangle to hit up to 3 targets, and increases maximum health by 30%.

Lasts 30 sec. You may freely shapeshift in and out of this improved Bear Form for its duration.

102793.name: Ursol's Vortex
102793.description: Conjures a vortex of wind for 10 sec at the destination, reducing the movement speed of all enemies within 8 yards by 50%. The first time an enemy attempts to leave the vortex, winds will pull that enemy back to its center. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

102794.name: Ursol's Vortex
102794.description: Conjures a vortex of wind at the destination location that pulls all enemies within 8 yards toward it.

104316.name: Call Dreadstalkers
104316.description: Summons 2 ferocious Dreadstalkers to attack the target for 12 sec.

104773.name: Unending Resolve
104773.description: Hardens your skin, reducing all damage you take by 25% and granting immunity to interrupt, silence, and pushback effects for 8 sec.

106830.name: Thrash
106830.description:
Strikes all nearby enemies, dealing (35.55% of Attack Power) Bleed damage and an additional (90% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 15 sec.

Awards 1 combo point.

106839.name: Skull Bash
106839.description: You charge and bash the target's skull, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

106898.name: Stampeding Roar
106898.description: Shift into Bear Form and let loose a wild roar, increasing the movement speed of all friendly players within 15 yards by 60% for 8 sec.

107079.name: Quaking Palm
107079.description: Strikes the target with lightning speed, incapacitating them for 4 sec, and turns off your attack.

107270.name: Spinning Crane Kick
107270.description:
Windwalker
Spin while kicking in the air, dealing [4 * (10% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Physical damage over 1.5 sec to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

 Brewmaster,  Mistweaver
Spin while kicking in the air, dealing [4 * (10% of Attack Power)] Physical damage over 1.5 sec to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

107428.name: Rising Sun Kick
107428.description:
Windwalker
Kick upwards, dealing [(143.8% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Physical damage.

 Brewmaster
Kick upwards, dealing (143.8% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

 Mistweaver
Kick upwards, dealing (143.8% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

107570.name: Storm Bolt
107570.description: Hurls your weapon at an enemy, causing (28.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage and stunning for 4 sec. [Storm Bolts: Also hits 2 additional nearby targets, stunning for 2 sec]

107574.name: Avatar
107574.description:
Fury
Transform into a colossus, increasing all damage you deal by 20% and increasing your movement speed by 5% for 20 sec.

 Protection
Transform into a colossus, increasing all damage you deal by 20% and reducing all damage you take by 3% for 20 sec.

 Arms
Transform into a colossus, increasing all damage you deal by 20% and reducing damage you take from area of effect attacks by 5% for 20 sec.

108199.name: Gorefiend's Grasp
108199.description: Shadowy tendrils coil around all enemies within 15 yards of a hostile or friendly target, pulling them to the target's location and Silencing them for 3 sec.

108271.name: Astral Shift
108271.description: Shift partially into the elemental planes, taking 40% less damage for 12 sec.

108280.name: Healing Tide Totem
108280.description:
Summons a totem at your feet for 10 sec, which pulses every 2 sec, healing all party or raid members within 40 yards for (514.5% of Spell Power).

Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

108287.name: Totemic Projection
108287.description: Relocates your active totems to the specified location.

108366.name: Soul Leech
108366.description: All single-target damage done by you and your minions grants you and your pet shadowy shields that absorb 3% of the damage dealt for 15 sec, up to 5% of maximum health.

108416.name: Dark Pact
108416.description: Sacrifices 20% of your current health to shield you for 200% of the sacrificed health plus an additional (Spell Power * 2.5) for 20 sec. Usable while suffering from control impairing effects.

108503.name: Grimoire of Sacrifice
108503.description:
Sacrifices your demon pet for power, gaining its command demon ability, and causing your spells to sometimes also deal (37.1875% of Spell Power) additional Shadow damage.

Lasts until canceled or until you summon a demon pet.

108853.name: Fire Blast
108853.description:
Blasts the enemy, critically striking for [(98.625% of Spell Power) * 2] Fire damage.

Castable while casting other spells.

109248.name: Binding Shot
109248.description: Fires a magical projectile, tethering the enemy and any other enemies within 5 yds for 10 sec, stunning them for 3 sec if they move more than 5 yds from the arrow. [Binding Shackles: Targets stunned by Binding Shot deal 10% less damage to you for 8 sec after the effect ends]

109304.name: Exhilaration
109304.description: Heals you for 30% and your pet for 100% of maximum health. [Rejuvenating Wind: Exhilaration heals you for an additional 12.0% of your maximum health over 8 sec]

110959.name: Greater Invisibility
110959.description: Makes you invisible and untargetable for 20 sec, removing all threat. Any action taken cancels this effect.

111400.name: Burning Rush
111400.description: Increases your movement speed by 50%, but also damages you for 4% of your maximum health every 1 sec. Movement impairing effects may not reduce you below 100% of normal movement speed. Lasts until canceled.

111673.name: Control Undead
111673.description: Dominates the target undead creature up to level 38, forcing it to do your bidding for 5 min.

111771.name: Demonic Gateway
111771.description: Creates a demonic gateway between two locations. Activating the gateway transports the user to the other gateway. Each player can use a Demonic Gateway only once per 90 sec.

113344.name: Bloodbath
113344.description:
Assault the target in a bloodthirsty craze, dealing (509.046% of Attack Power) Physical damage and restoring 3% of your health.

Bloodbath wounds the target to suffer (60% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 6 sec. Using Bloodbath on a target that is affected by Bloodbath extends the bleed by 6 sec.

Generates 8 Rage and has a 30% chance to Enrage you.

113656.name: Fists of Fury
113656.description: Pummels all targets in front of you, dealing [5 * (260.82% of Attack Power)] Physical damage to your primary target and [5 * (260.82% of Attack Power) * 60 / 100] damage to all other enemies over 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. Can be channeled while moving.

113724.name: Ring of Frost
113724.description:
Summons a Ring of Frost for 10 sec at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are incapacitated for 10 sec. Limit 10 targets.

When the incapacitate expires, enemies are slowed by 65% for 4 sec.

113780.name: Deadly Poison
113780.description: Poisoned weapons have a chance to deal (8.14% of Attack Power) Nature damage to a target already affected by Deadly Poison.

114014.name: Shuriken Toss
114014.description:
Throws a shuriken at an enemy target for [(23.7838% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Physical damage.

Awards 1 combo point.

114018.name: Shroud of Concealment
114018.description: Extend a cloak that shrouds party and raid members within 30 yards in shadows, providing stealth for 15 sec.

114050.name: Ascendance
114050.description:
Transform into a Flame Ascendant for 15 sec, instantly casting a Flame Shock and a 100% effectiveness Lava Burst at up to 6 nearby enemies.

While ascended, Elemental Overload damage is increased by 75% and spells affected by your Mastery: Elemental Overload cause 1 additional Elemental Overload.

114051.name: Ascendance
114051.description:
Transform into an Air Ascendant for 15 sec and unleash Doom Winds, reducing the cooldown and cost of Stormstrike by 60%, and transforming your auto attack and Stormstrike into Wind attacks which bypass armor and have a 30 yd range.

Maelstrom Weapon spenders have a 0.5% chance to unleash Doom Winds per Maelstrom Weapon spent while Ascendance is not active.

114052.name: Ascendance
114052.description:
Immediately heals for (1287.72% of Spell Power) split between allies within 20 yds and transforms into a Water Ascendant for 15 sec.

While ascended, Chain Heal jumps to 3 additional allies with 10% healing reduced for all jumps, Healing Wave always critical heals and heals 1 additional ally at 50% effectiveness, and the mana cost of Chain Heal and Healing Wave is reduced by 25%.

114165.name: Holy Prism
114165.description:
Fires a beam of light that scatters to strike a clump of targets. 

If the beam is aimed at an enemy target, it deals (648% of Spell Power) Holy damage and radiates [(688% of Spell Power) * 1] healing to 5 allies within 30 yds.

If the beam is aimed at a friendly target, it heals for [(1587.6% of Spell Power) * 1] and radiates (245.7% of Spell Power) Holy damage to 5 enemies within 30 yds.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

114852.name: Holy Prism
114852.description:
Fires a beam of light that scatters to strike a clump of targets. 

If the beam is aimed at an enemy target, it deals (648% of Spell Power) Holy damage and radiates [(688% of Spell Power) * 1] healing to 5 allies within 30 yds.

If the beam is aimed at a friendly target, it heals for [(1587.6% of Spell Power) * 1] and radiates (245.7% of Spell Power) Holy damage to 5 enemies within 30 yds.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

114871.name: Holy Prism
114871.description:
Fires a beam of light that scatters to strike a clump of targets. 

If the beam is aimed at an enemy target, it deals (648% of Spell Power) Holy damage and radiates [(688% of Spell Power) * 1] healing to 5 allies within 30 yds.

If the beam is aimed at a friendly target, it heals for [(1587.6% of Spell Power) * 1] and radiates (245.7% of Spell Power) Holy damage to 5 enemies within 30 yds.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

114911.name: Ancestral Guidance
114911.description: For the next 10 sec, 25% of your healing done and 25% of your damage done is converted to healing on up to 3 nearby injured party or raid members, up to (Total Health * 20 / 100) healing to each target per second.

114919.name: Light's Hammer
114919.description: Hurls a Light-infused hammer to the ground, dealing (20.5% of Spell Power) Holy damage to nearby enemies and healing up to 6 nearby allies for (48% of Spell Power), every 2 sec for 14 sec.

115008.name: Chi Torpedo
115008.description: Torpedoes you forward a long distance and increases your movement speed by 30% for 10 sec, stacking up to 2 times.

115078.name: Paralysis
115078.description: Incapacitates the target for 1 min. Limit 1. Damage may cancel the effect.

115151.name: Renewing Mist
115151.description:
Surrounds the target with healing mists, restoring (196.65% of Spell Power) health over 20 sec.

If Renewing Mist heals a target past maximum health, it will travel to another injured ally within 20 yds.

115175.name: Soothing Mist
115175.description: Heals the target for (1680% of Spell Power) over 8 sec. While channeling, Enveloping Mist [Surging Mist: Surging Mist] [Zen Pulse: Zen Pulse] and Vivify may be cast instantly on the target.

115181.name: Breath of Fire
115181.description:
Breathe fire on targets in front of you, causing (100% of Attack Power) Fire damage. Deals reduced damage to secondary targets.

Targets affected by Keg Smash will also burn, taking (66% of Attack Power) Fire damage and dealing 5% reduced damage to you for 12 sec.

115310.name: Revival
115310.description:
Heals all party and raid members within 40 yds for (5988.28% of Spell Power) and clears them of 3 harmful Magic, all Poison, and all Disease effects.

Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

115313.name: Summon Jade Serpent Statue
115313.description: Summons a Jade Serpent Statue at the target location. When you channel Soothing Mist, the statue will also begin to channel Soothing Mist on your target, healing for (560% of Spell Power) over 8 sec.

115315.name: Summon Black Ox Statue
115315.description:
Summons a Black Ox Statue at the target location for 15 min, pulsing threat to all enemies within 20 yards.

You may cast Provoke on the statue to taunt all enemies near the statue.

115356.name: Windstrike
115356.description: Hurl a staggering blast of wind at an enemy, dealing a total of [(334.222% of Attack Power)% + (334.222% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage, bypassing armor.

115357.name: Windstrike
115357.description: Hurl a staggering blast of wind at an enemy, dealing a total of [(334.222% of Attack Power)% + (334.222% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage, bypassing armor.

115399.name: Black Ox Brew
115399.description: Chug some Black Ox Brew, which instantly refills your Energy, Purifying Brew charges, and grants one charge of Celestial Brew or Celestial Infusion.

115450.name: Detox
115450.description: Removes all Magic effects from the target.

115546.name: Provoke
115546.description: Taunts the target to attack you, and increases the threat you generate against them by 800% for 6 sec [Hasty Provocation: Causes them to move toward you at 0% increased speed / .] [Summon Black Ox Statue: This ability can be targeted on your Statue of the Black Ox, causing the same effect on all enemies within  10 yards of the statue]

115750.name: Blinding Light
115750.description: Emits dazzling light in all directions, blinding enemies within 10 yds, causing them to wander disoriented for 6 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

116095.name: Disable
116095.description: Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 15 sec, duration refreshed by your melee attacks. [Disable: Targets already snared will be rooted for 8 sec instead]

116670.name: Vivify
116670.description: Causes a surge of invigorating mists, healing the target for [(258% of Spell Power)] [Invigorating Mists: and all allies with your Renewing Mist active for (323.18% of Spell Power)].

116680.name: Thunder Focus Tea
116680.description:
Receive a jolt of energy, empowering your next spell cast:

Enveloping Mist: Immediately heals for (748.8% of Spell Power) and is instant cast.
Renewing Mist: Duration increased by 10 sec.
Rising Sun Kick: Cooldown reduced by 9 sec.
 [Thunderous Focus Tea: Crackling Jade Lightning: Knockback applied immediately.
Roll: Refund a charge and heal yourself for (240% of Attack Power)]

116705.name: Spear Hand Strike
116705.description: Jabs the target in the throat, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 5 sec.

116841.name: Tiger's Lust
116841.description: Increases a friendly target's movement speed by 70% for 6 sec and removes all roots and snares.

116844.name: Ring of Peace
116844.description: Form a Ring of Peace at the target location for 5 sec. Enemies that enter will be ejected from the Ring.

116847.name: Rushing Jade Wind
116847.description: Summons a whirling tornado around you, causing [(9) * (13.3% of Attack Power)] Physical damage over 6 sec to all enemies within 8 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

116849.name: Life Cocoon
116849.description: Encases the target in a cocoon of Chi energy for 12 sec, absorbing [Total Health * 48 / 100 * (1 + Versatility)] damage and increasing all healing over time received by 50%.

116858.name: Chaos Bolt
116858.description: Unleashes a devastating blast of chaos, dealing a critical strike for [2 * (408.618% of Spell Power)] Chaos damage. Damage is further increased by your critical strike chance.

117014.name: Elemental Blast
117014.description:
Enhancement
Harnesses the raw power of the elements, dealing (201.25% of Spell Power) Elemental damage and increasing your Critical Strike or Haste by 3% or Mastery by (3 * 1.875)% for 10 sec.

 Elemental
Harnesses the raw power of the elements, dealing (201.25% of Spell Power) Elemental damage and increasing your Critical Strike or Haste by 8% or Mastery by (8 * 1.875)% for 10 sec.

117313.name: Bloodthirst Heal
117313.description: Bloodthirst heals the Warrior for 3% of their health.

117418.name: Fists of Fury
117418.description: Pummels all targets in front of you, dealing [5 * (260.82% of Attack Power)] Physical damage to your primary target and [5 * (260.82% of Attack Power) * 60 / 100] damage to all other enemies over 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. Can be channeled while moving.

117526.name: Binding Shot
117526.description: Fires a magical projectile, tethering the enemy and any other enemies within 5 yds for 10 sec, stunning them for 3 sec if they move more than 5 yds from the arrow. [Binding Shackles: Targets stunned by Binding Shot deal 10% less damage to you for 8 sec after the effect ends]

117952.name: Crackling Jade Lightning
117952.description: Channel Jade lightning, causing (22.4% of Attack Power) Nature damage over 4 sec to the target and sometimes knocking back melee attackers.

118038.name: Die by the Sword
118038.description: Increases your parry chance by 100% and reduces all damage you take by 30% for 8 sec.

118779.name: Victory Rush
118779.description:
Strikes the target, causing (47.2% of Attack Power) damage and healing you for 10% of your maximum health.

Only usable within 20 sec after you kill an enemy that yields experience or honor.

119381.name: Leg Sweep
119381.description: Knocks down all enemies within 6 yards, stunning them for 3 sec.

119582.name: Purifying Brew
119582.description: Clears 50% of your Staggered damage, or a minimum of 8% of your maximum health.

119611.name: Renewing Mist
119611.description:
Surrounds the target with healing mists, restoring (196.65% of Spell Power) health over 20 sec.

If Renewing Mist heals a target past maximum health, it will travel to another injured ally within 20 yds.

119898.name: Command Demon
119898.description:
Commands your demon to perform its most powerful ability. This spell will transform based on your active pet. 
 [Summon Felguard: Felguard: Axe Toss]
Felhunter: Spell Lock
Voidwalker: Shadow Bulwark
Incubus/Succubus: Seduction
Imp: Singe Magic

120146.name: Ancient Portal: Dalaran
120146.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Dalaran.

120517.name: Halo
120517.description:
Creates a ring of Holy energy around you that quickly expands to a 40 yd radius, healing allies for (161% of Spell Power) and dealing [(144.2% of Spell Power) * 1] Holy damage to enemies.

Healing reduced beyond 6 targets.

120644.name: Halo
120644.description: Creates a ring of Shadow energy around you that quickly expands to a 40 yd radius, healing allies for (161% of Spell Power) and dealing [(144.2% of Spell Power) * 1 * 1 * 1] Shadow damage to enemies. Healing reduced beyond 6 targets. [ Shadow: Generates 5 Insanity.]

121093.name: Gift of the Naaru
121093.description: Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

121183.name: Contemplation
121183.description: Allows you a moment of peace as you kneel in quiet contemplation to ponder the nature of the Light.

121253.name: Keg Smash
121253.description: Smash a keg of brew, dealing [(190% of Attack Power) * (1.5)] Physical damage to your primary target and (190% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all other enemies within 8 yds, and reducing their movement speed by 20% for 15 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

121471.name: Shadow Blades
121471.description: Draws upon surrounding shadows to empower your weapons, causing your attacks to deal 20% additional damage as Shadow and causing your combo point generating abilities to generate double combo points for 16 sec.

121536.name: Angelic Feather
121536.description: Places a feather at the target location, granting the first ally to walk through it 40% increased movement speed for 5 sec. Only 3 feathers can be placed at one time.

122470.name: Touch of Karma
122470.description: Absorbs all damage taken for 10 sec, up to 50% of your maximum health, and redirects 70% of that amount to the enemy target as Nature damage over 6 sec.

123586.name: Flying Serpent Kick
123586.description:
Soar forward through the air at high speed for 1.5 sec.
 
If used again while active, you will land, reducing the movement speed of enemies within 8 yds by 70% for 4 sec.

123904.name: Invoke Xuen, the White Tiger
123904.description: Summons an effigy of Xuen, the White Tiger for 20 sec. Xuen attacks your primary target, and strikes 3 enemies within 10 yards every 1 sec with Tiger Lightning for (25.7% of Attack Power) Nature damage. [Empowered Tiger Lightning: Every 4 sec, Xuen strikes your enemies with Empowered Tiger Lightning dealing 4% of the damage you have dealt to those targets in the last 4 sec]

123986.name: Chi Burst
123986.description:
Windwalker,  Mistweaver
Hurls a torrent of Chi energy up to 40 yds forward, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Nature damage to all enemies, and (220% of Attack Power) healing to the Monk and all allies in its path. Healing and damage reduced beyond 5 targets.


 Brewmaster
Hurls a torrent of Chi energy up to 40 yds forward, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Nature damage to all enemies, and (220% of Attack Power) healing to the Monk and all allies in its path. Healing and damage reduced beyond 5 targets.


Casting Chi Burst does not prevent avoiding attacks.

124280.name: Touch of Karma
124280.description: Absorbs all damage taken for 10 sec, up to 50% of your maximum health, and redirects 70% of that amount to the enemy target as Nature damage over 6 sec.

124682.name: Enveloping Mist
124682.description: Wraps the target in healing mists, healing for (748.8% of Spell Power) over 6 sec / Mist Wrap: 7 sec / Invoke Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent: 10 sec / Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane: 10 sec, and increasing healing received from your other spells by 10%.

125050.name: Fetch
125050.description: Command your pet to retrieve the loot from a nearby corpse within 40 yards.

125355.name: Healing Sphere
125355.description: When you kill an enemy, you summon a Healing Sphere, healing you for (196.56% of Attack Power) when you walk through it. [Afterlife: When you kill an enemy with Blackout Kick, you have a 50% chance to summon a Chi Sphere, granting 1 Chi when you walk through it]

125883.name: Zen Flight
125883.description: You fly through the air at a quick speed on a meditative cloud.

126819.name: Polymorph
126819.description:
Transforms the enemy into a porcupine, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

126892.name: Zen Pilgrimage
126892.description:
Your spirit travels to your home temple, leaving your body behind. 

Use Zen Pilgrimage again to return back to near your departure point.

126893.name: Zen Pilgrimage/Death Gate/Moonglade Storage Aura I

126895.name: Zen Pilgrimage: Return
126895.description:
Returns your spirit back to its body, returning you near to where you once were.

Leaving Peak of Serenity will cancel Zen Pilgrimage: Return.

127344.name: Corpse Exploder
127344.description: Cause a target corpse to explode in a shower of gore. Does not affect mechanical or elemental corpses.

127757.name: Charm Woodland Creature
127757.description: Allows the Druid to befriend an ambient creature, which will follow the Druid for 1 hour.

127933.name: Fireworks
127933.description: Launch fireworks from your gun, bow or crossbow.

129597.name: Arcane Torrent
129597.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore .

130654.name: Chi Burst
130654.description:
Hurls a torrent of Chi energy up to 40 yds forward, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Nature damage to all enemies, and (220% of Attack Power) healing to the Monk and all allies in its path. Healing and damage reduced beyond 5 targets.
 [ Brewmaster: Casting Chi Burst does not prevent avoiding attacks]

131347.name: Glide
131347.description:
Reduces your falling speed.

You can activate this ability with the jump key while falling.

131784.name: Illusion
131784.description: Transforms the Mage to look like another player for 2 min.

132157.name: Holy Nova
132157.description: An explosion of holy light around you deals up to (40.95% of Spell Power) Holy damage to enemies and up to (31.5% of Spell Power) healing to allies within 12 yds, reduced if there are more than 5 targets.

132158.name: Nature's Swiftness
132158.description: Your next Regrowth, Rebirth, [Ancient of Lore: Ancient of Lore]or Entangling Roots is instant, free, castable in all forms, and heals for an additional 60%.

132463.name: Chi Wave
132463.description:
Brewmaster
Every 15 sec, your next Keg Smash or Vivify releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing (20% of Attack Power) Nature damage or (60% of Attack Power) healing. Bounces up to 7 times to targets within 25 yards.

 Mistweaver
Every 15 sec, your next Rising Sun Kick or Vivify releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing (20% of Attack Power) Nature damage or (60% of Attack Power) healing. Bounces up to 7 times to targets within 25 yards.

 Windwalker
Every 15 sec, your next Rising Sun Kick or Vivify releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing (20% of Attack Power) Nature damage or (60% of Attack Power) healing. Bounces up to 7 times to targets within 25 yards.

132467.name: Chi Wave
132467.description:
Brewmaster
Every 15 sec, your next Keg Smash or Vivify releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing (20% of Attack Power) Nature damage or (60% of Attack Power) healing. Bounces up to 7 times to targets within 25 yards.

 Mistweaver

 Windwalker

132469.name: Typhoon
132469.description: Blasts targets within 15 yards in front of you with a violent Typhoon, knocking them back and reducing their movement speed by 50% for 6 sec. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

132578.name: Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox
132578.description:
Summons an effigy of Niuzao, the Black Ox for 25 sec that attacks your primary target and Stomps when you cast Blackout Kick, damaging all nearby enemies.

While active, 40% of damage delayed by Stagger is instead Staggered by Niuzao, and Niuzao is healed for 100% of your purified Stagger.

132620.name: Portal: Vale of Eternal Blossoms
132620.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Vale of Eternal Blossoms.

132621.name: Teleport: Vale of Eternal Blossoms
132621.description: Teleports you to Vale of Eternal Blossoms.

132626.name: Portal: Vale of Eternal Blossoms
132626.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Vale of Eternal Blossoms.

132627.name: Teleport: Vale of Eternal Blossoms
132627.description: Teleports you to Vale of Eternal Blossoms.

138430.name: Ancient Zandalari Knowledge
138430.description: Learn the ancient Zandalari secrets of taming Direhorns.

141425.name: Frostbolt Volley
141425.description: Inflicts Frost damage to nearby enemies, reducing their movement speed for 4 sec.

145109.name: Ysera's Gift
145109.description: Heals you for 3% of your maximum health every 5 sec. If you are at full health, an injured party or raid member will be healed instead.

145110.name: Ysera's Gift
145110.description: Heals you for 3% of your maximum health every 5 sec. If you are at full health, an injured party or raid member will be healed instead.

145205.name: Efflorescence
145205.description: Grows a healing blossom at the target location, restoring (58.56% of Spell Power) health to three injured allies within 10 yards every 2 sec for 30 sec. Limit 1.

146739.name: Corruption
146739.description: Corrupts the target, causing (35.0864% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and an additional (231.368% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 14 sec.

147362.name: Counter Shot
147362.description: Interrupts spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

152108.name: Cataclysm
152108.description: Calls forth a cataclysm at the target location, dealing (364.5% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards and afflicting them with Immolate.

152175.name: Whirling Dragon Punch
152175.description:
Performs a devastating whirling upward strike, dealing [3 * (241.5% of Attack Power)] damage to all nearby enemies and an additional (450% of Attack Power) damage to the first target struck. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Only usable while both Fists of Fury and Rising Sun Kick are on cooldown.

153561.name: Meteor
153561.description:
Calls down a meteor which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing (900% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies, and burns the ground, dealing [8 * (52% of Spell Power)] Fire damage over 4 sec to all enemies in the area.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

153626.name: Arcane Orb
153626.description:
Launches an Arcane Orb forward from your position, traveling up to 40 yds, dealing (243.2% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to enemies it passes through.

Grants 1 Arcane Charge when cast and every time it deals damage.

155145.name: Arcane Torrent
155145.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 1 Holy Power.

155835.name: Bristling Fur
155835.description: Bristle your fur, causing you to generate Rage based on damage taken for 8 sec.

156322.name: Eternal Flame
156322.description:
Heals an ally for (378% of Spell Power) and an additional (109.44% of Spell Power) over 16 sec.

Healing increased by 25% when cast on self.

156910.name: Beacon of Faith
156910.description: Mark a second target as a Beacon, mimicking the effects of Beacon of Light. Your heals will now heal both of your Beacons, but at 30% reduced effectiveness.

157980.name: Supernova
157980.description: Pulses arcane energy around the target enemy or ally, dealing (34.5% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to all enemies within 8 yds, and knocking them upward. A primary enemy target will take 100% increased damage.

157982.name: Tranquility
157982.description:
Heals all allies within 40 yards for [5 * (1019.92% of Spell Power)] over 6 sec. [Flourish: Extends the duration of all your heal over time effects by 2 sec every 1 sec]

Healing decreased beyond 5 targets.

157997.name: Ice Nova
157997.description: Causes a whirl of icy wind around the enemy, dealing (138% of Spell Power) Frost damage to the target and all other enemies within 8 yds, freezing them in place for 2 sec. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

161353.name: Polymorph
161353.description:
Transforms the enemy into a polar bear cub, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

161354.name: Polymorph
161354.description:
Transforms the enemy into a monkey, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

161355.name: Polymorph
161355.description:
Transforms the enemy into a penguin, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

161372.name: Polymorph
161372.description:
Transforms the enemy into a peacock, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

161862.name: Ascension
161862.description: Ascend into the air, keeping you out of harm's way. Lasts 20 sec. Can only be used while in Ashran.

162056.name: Jailer's Judgment
162056.description: Stuns the target Player for 6 sec. If the judgment holds for 6 sec, the enemy will be instantly teleported to your jail. Can only be used while in Ashran.

162243.name: Demon's Bite
162243.description:
Quickly attack for (105.05% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

Generates 20 to 30 Fury.

162487.name: Steel Trap
162487.description:
Hurls a Steel Trap to the target location that snaps shut on the first enemy that approaches, immobilizing them for 20 sec and causing them to bleed for (32% of Attack Power) damage over 20 sec. 

Damage other than Steel Trap may break the immobilization effect. Trap will exist for 1 min. Limit 1.

162794.name: Chaos Strike
162794.description: Slice your target for [(69.432% of Attack Power) + (109.12% of Attack Power)] Chaos damage. Chaos Strike has a [Min(20, 100)]% chance to refund 20 Fury.

163201.name: Execute
163201.description: Attempts to finish off a foe, causing up to [2.0 * (242.125% of Attack Power)] Physical damage based on Rage spent. Only usable on enemies that have less than 20% health. [Improved Execute: If your foe survives, 10% of the Rage spent is refunded]

164812.name: Moonfire
164812.description: A quick beam of lunar light burns the enemy for (21.2% of Spell Power) Arcane damage and then an additional (165.6% of Spell Power) Arcane damage over 18 sec [Scintillating Moonlight: and causes enemies to deal 1% less damage to you / .] [Astral Power: Generates 0 Astral Power.]

164815.name: Sunfire
164815.description:
Feral,  Guardian,  Restoration
A quick beam of solar light burns the enemy for (21.2% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (165.6% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 18 sec.

 Balance
A quick beam of solar light burns the enemy for (21.2% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (165.6% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 18 sec.

Generates 0 Astral Power.

164862.name: Flap
164862.description: You flap your wings, slowing your falling speed.

165962.name: Flight Form
165962.description:
Shapeshift into flight form, increasing movement speed and allowing you to fly. Cannot use in combat. 

The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of movement impairing effects.

167105.name: Colossus Smash
167105.description: Smash the ground and shatter the armor of all enemies within 10 yds, dealing (306.263% of Attack Power) Physical damage and increasing damage you deal to them by 30% for 10 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

169340.name: Touch of Fatality
169340.description: Instantly kills any creature under level 50, or player under 20% health.

175686.name: Stopping Power
175686.description: Placeholder for level 75 talented active ability.

176244.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Warspear.

176246.name: Portal: Stormshield

179057.name: Chaos Nova
179057.description: Unleash an eruption of fel energy, dealing (27.4816% of Attack Power) Chaos damage and stunning all nearby enemies for 3 sec. [Chaos Fragments: Each enemy stunned by Chaos Nova has a 30% chance to generate a Lesser Soul Fragment]

183435.name: Retribution Aura
183435.description: When any party or raid member within 40 yds takes more than 30% of their health in damage in a single hit, each member gains 5% increased damage and healing, decaying over 30 sec. This cannot occur within 30 sec of the aura being applied.

183752.name: Disrupt
183752.description: Interrupts the enemy's spellcasting and locks them from that school of magic for 5 sec. [Disrupting Fury: Generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt]

184364.name: Enraged Regeneration
184364.description: Reduces damage taken by 30% and Bloodthirst restores an additional 20% health for 8 sec. Usable while stunned or incapacitated.

184367.name: Rampage
184367.description:
Unleash a series of 4 brutal strikes for a total of [(203.065% of Attack Power) + (118.455% of Attack Power) + (270.756% of Attack Power) + (152.3% of Attack Power)] Physical damage.

Enrages you.

184575.name: Blade of Justice
184575.description:
[Blade of Vengeance: Pierce enemies / Pierce an enemy] with a blade of light, dealing (137.769% of Attack Power) Holy damage [Blade of Vengeance: to your target and (58.5195% of Attack Power) Holy damage to nearby enemies / .]

Generates 1 Holy Power.

185123.name: Throw Glaive
185123.description: Throw a demonic glaive at the target, dealing (49.2352% of Attack Power) Physical damage. The glaive can ricochet to [Bouncing Glaives: 1 additional enemies / an additional enemy] within 10 yards.

185245.name: Torment
185245.description: Taunts the target to attack you, and increases the threat you generate against them by 800% for 6 sec.

185311.name: Crimson Vial
185311.description: Drink an alchemical concoction that heals you for 20% of your maximum health over 4 sec.

185313.name: Shadow Dance
185313.description: Allows use of all Stealth abilities and grants all the combat benefits of Stealth for 6 sec. Effect not broken from taking damage or attacking.

185358.name: Arcane Shot
185358.description: A quick shot that causes (272.3% of Attack Power)% Arcane damage. [Lethal Shots: Arcane Shot has a 30% chance to reduce the cooldown of Rapid Fire by 5.0 sec]

185438.name: Shadowstrike
185438.description:
Strike the target, dealing (559% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

While Stealthed, you strike through the shadows and appear behind your target up to 25 yds away, dealing 25% additional damage.

Awards 2 combo points.

185565.name: Poisoned Knife
185565.description:
Throws a poison-coated knife, dealing (23.232% of Attack Power) damage and applying your active Lethal and Non-Lethal Poisons.

Awards 1 combo point.

185763.name: Pistol Shot
185763.description:
Draw a concealed pistol and fire a quick shot at an enemy, dealing [(83.4% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Physical damage and reducing the target's movement speed by 30% for 6 sec.

Awards 1 combo point.

186257.name: Aspect of the Cheetah
186257.description: Increases your movement speed by 90% for 3 sec. Upon expiring, increases your movement speed by 30% for another 9 sec.

186265.name: Aspect of the Turtle

186270.name: Raptor Strike
186270.description: A vicious slash dealing (393.25% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

186289.name: Aspect of the Eagle
186289.description: Increases the range of your [Mongoose Bite / Raptor Strike] and Mastery: Spirit Bond to 40 yds for 15 sec.

187394.name: Chaos Barrage
187394.description: Deals (13.75% of Spell Power) Chaos damage.

187650.name: Freezing Trap
187650.description: Hurls a frost trap to the target location that incapacitates the first enemy that approaches for 1 min. Damage may break the effect. Limit 1. Trap will exist for 1 min.

187698.name: Tar Trap
187698.description: Hurls a tar trap to the target location that creates a 8 yd radius pool of tar around itself for 30 sec when the first enemy approaches. All enemies have 50% reduced movement speed while in the area of effect. Limit 1. Trap will exist for 1 min.

187707.name: Muzzle
187707.description: Interrupts spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

187827.name: Metamorphosis
187827.description: Transform to demon form for 15 sec, increasing current health by 40%, healing for that amount, and increasing Armor by 200% [First of the Illidari: Versatility increased by 0%] [Metamorphosis: While transformed, Fracture generates one additional Lesser Soul Fragment] [and 15 additional Fury].

187874.name: Crash Lightning
187874.description:
Electrocutes all enemies in front of you, dealing (183.617% of Attack Power) Nature damage. 

Enhances your weapons for 12 sec, causing Stormstrike and Lava Lash to discharge (97.7592% of Attack Power) Nature damage split between up to 5 enemies in front of you. [Storm Unleashed: Multiple applications may overlap]

188196.name: Lightning Bolt
188196.description: Hurls a bolt of lightning at the target, dealing (131.1% of Spell Power) Nature damage.

188443.name: Chain Lightning
188443.description: Hurls a lightning bolt at the enemy, dealing (73.025% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then jumping to additional nearby enemies. Affects 3 total targets

188499.name: Blade Dance
188499.description: Strike nearby enemies for [3 * (23.35% of Attack Power)% + (70% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

188501.name: Spectral Sight
188501.description:
Allows you to see enemies and treasures through physical barriers, as well as enemies that are stealthed and invisible. Lasts 8 sec.

Loss of control effects disrupt the sight.

189110.name: Infernal Strike
189110.description: Leap through the air toward a targeted location, dealing (62.6% of Attack Power) Fire damage to all enemies within 6 yards.

190319.name: Combustion
190319.description:
Engulfs you in flames for 10 sec, increasing your spells' critical strike chance by 100%.
[
Additionally, increases your spell damage by 0%.]

Castable while casting other spells.

190336.name: Conjure Refreshment
190336.description: Conjures mana food for you and your allies. Conjured items disappear if logged out for more than 15 minutes.

190356.name: Blizzard
190356.description:
Ice shards pelt the target area, dealing [(44.28% of Spell Power) * 8] Frost damage over 12 sec and reducing movement speed by 50% for 3 sec.

This spell is cast at a selected location

190411.name: Whirlwind
190411.description: Unleashes a whirlwind of steel, striking all nearby enemies for [(50.3989% of Attack Power) + (50.3989% of Attack Power) + (2 * ((50.3989% of Attack Power) + (50.3989% of Attack Power)))] Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. [Improved Whirlwind: Causes your next 4 single-target melee attacks to strike up to 4 additional targets for 65% damage] [Generates 3 Rage, plus an additional 1 per target hit.]

190456.name: Ignore Pain
190456.description:
Arms,  Fury
Fight through the pain, ignoring 50% of damage taken until [0 * (1 + Versatility)] damage has been prevented.

 Protection
Fight through the pain, ignoring 50% of damage taken until [0 * (1 + Versatility)] damage has been prevented.

Repeated uses of Ignore Pain accumulate, up to (Total Health * 30 / 100) total damage prevented.

190778.name: Sindragosa's Fury
190778.description: Summons Sindragosa, who breathes frost on all enemies within 40 yd in front of you, dealing (420% of Attack Power) Frost damage and slowing movement speed by 50% for 10 sec.

190780.name: Frost Breath
190780.description: Summons Sindragosa, who breathes frost on all enemies within 40 yd in front of you, dealing (420% of Attack Power) Frost damage and slowing movement speed by 50% for 10 sec.

190784.name: Divine Steed
190784.description: Leap atop your Charger for 3 sec, increasing movement speed by 100%. Usable while indoors or in combat.

190925.name: Harpoon
190925.description: Hurls a harpoon at an enemy, rooting them in place for 3 sec and pulling you to them.

190984.name: Wrath
190984.description: Hurl a ball of energy at the target, dealing (133.1% of Spell Power) Nature damage.

191034.name: Starfall
191034.description:
Guardian (Guardian Druid)
Calls down waves of falling stars upon enemies within 40 yds, dealing [9 * (25.3% of Spell Power)] Astral damage over 8 sec. Multiple uses of this ability may overlap.

 Balance
Calls down waves of falling stars upon enemies within 40 yds, dealing [9 * (25.3% of Spell Power)] Astral damage over 8 sec. Multiple uses of this ability may overlap. [Aetherial Kindling: Extends the duration of active Moonfires and Sunfires by 3 sec]

191427.name: Metamorphosis
191427.description:
Leap into the air and land with explosive force, dealing (44% of Attack Power) Chaos damage to enemies within 8 yds, and stunning them for 3 sec. Players are Dazed for 3 sec instead.

Upon landing, you are transformed into a hellish demon for 20 sec, [Metamorphosis: immediately resetting the cooldown of your Eye Beam and Blade Dance abilities]greatly empowering your Chaos Strike and Blade Dance abilities and gaining 20% Haste[and 0% Leech].

191634.name: Stormkeeper
191634.description: Charge yourself with lightning, causing your next 2 Lightning Bolts to deal 150% more damage, and also causes your next 2 Lightning Bolts or Chain Lightings to be instant cast and trigger an Elemental Overload on every target.

192058.name: Capacitor Totem
192058.description: Summons a totem at the target location that gathers electrical energy from the surrounding air and explodes after 2 sec, stunning all enemies within 8 yards for 3 sec.

192063.name: Gust of Wind
192063.description: A gust of wind hurls you forward.

192077.name: Wind Rush Totem
192077.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 15 sec, continually granting all allies who pass within 10 yards 40% increased movement speed for 5 sec.

192081.name: Ironfur
192081.description: Increases armor by (124 / Master Shapeshifter: 161 / Reinforced Fur: 139 * Agility / 100) for 7 sec.

192106.name: Lightning Shield
192106.description:
Elemental
Surround yourself with a shield of lightning for 1 hour.

Melee attackers have a 100% chance to suffer (21.75% of Spell Power) Nature damage and have a 0% chance to generate 5 Maelstrom.

Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman at a time.

 Enhancement
Surround yourself with a shield of lightning for 1 hour.

Melee attackers have a 100% chance to suffer (21.75% of Spell Power) Nature damage and have a 50% chance to generate a stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman at a time.

 Restoration
Surround yourself with a shield of lightning for 1 hour.

Melee attackers have a 100% chance to suffer (21.75% of Spell Power) Nature damage.

Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman at a time.

193265.name: Hatchet Toss
193265.description: Tosses a hatchet at an enemy, dealing (100% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

193315.name: Sinister Strike
193315.description:
Viciously strike an enemy, causing [(122.3% of Attack Power) * ((Max(0, Min(90 - 10, 10)) * 8 + 195) / 275)] Physical damage. [Opportunity: Has a 30% chance to hit an additional time and make your next Pistol Shot cost 30% less Energy and deal 30% increased damage]

Awards 1 combo point each time it strikes.

193455.name: Cobra Shot
193455.description:
A quick shot causing [(313% of Attack Power) * ((Min(90 - 1, 19) * 12 + 112) / 340)] Physical damage.

Reduces the cooldown of Kill Command by 1 sec.

193753.name: Dreamwalk
193753.description:
Teleports the caster to the Emerald Dreamway.

Casting Dreamwalk again while in the Emerald Dreamway will return you back to near your departure point.

193759.name: Teleport: Hall of the Guardian
193759.description: Teleports you to the Hall of the Guardian.

194153.name: Starfire
194153.description:
Call down a burst of energy, causing (101.5% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to the target, and [(101.5% of Spell Power) * 70 / 100] Arcane damage to all other enemies within 10 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Generates (80 / Warrior of Elune: 104 / Wild Surges: 100 / Moon Guardian: 100 / 10) Astral Power.

194466.name: Phoenix's Flames
194466.description: Hurls a Phoenix that causes (97.35% of Spell Power) Fire damage to the target and splashes (32.45% of Spell Power) Fire damage to other nearby enemies. This damage is always a critical strike.

194509.name: Power Word: Radiance
194509.description: A burst of light heals the target and 4 injured allies within 40 yards for (575% of Spell Power), and applies Atonement for 60% of its normal duration.

194913.name: Glacial Advance
194913.description: Summon glacial spikes from the ground that advance forward, each dealing [(63.4275% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Frost damage near their eruption point and applying Razorice.

195072.name: Fel Rush
195072.description: Rush forward, incinerating anything in your path for (43.4673% of Attack Power) Chaos damage.

195182.name: Marrowrend
195182.description:
Smash the target, dealing (147.1% of Attack Power) Physical damage and generating 3 charges of Bone Shield.

 Bone Shield
Surrounds you with a barrier of whirling bones, increasing Armor by (180 * Strength / 100) [Marrowrend: and your Haste by 0%]. Each melee attack against you consumes a charge. Lasts 30 sec or until all charges are consumed.

195292.name: Death's Caress
195292.description:
Reach out with necrotic tendrils, dealing (43.74% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and applying Blood Plague to your target and generating 2 Bone Shield charges.

 Blood Plague
A shadowy disease that drains 64 health from the target over 24 sec.

195457.name: Grappling Hook
195457.description: Launch a grappling hook and pull yourself to the target location.

195645.name: Wing Clip
195645.description: Maims the target, reducing movement speed by 50% for 15 sec.

196277.name: Implosion
196277.description: Demonic forces suck 6 of your Wild Imps toward the target, and then cause them to violently explode, dealing (136.382% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards.

196447.name: Channel Demonfire
196447.description: Launches 15 bolts of felfire over 3 sec at random targets afflicted by your Immolate within 40 yds. Each bolt deals (39.355% of Spell Power) Fire damage to the target and (19.5657% of Spell Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies.

196586.name: Dimensional Rift
196586.description:
Rips a hole in time and space, opening a portal that damages your target.

Generates 3 Soul Shard Fragments.

196718.name: Darkness
196718.description:
Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.

196770.name: Remorseless Winter
196770.description: Drain the warmth of life from all nearby enemies within 8 yards, dealing [9 * (9.033% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Frost damage over 8 sec and reducing their movement speed by 20%.

196819.name: Eviscerate
196819.description:
Finishing move that disembowels the target, causing damage per combo point. [Shadowed Finishers: Targets with Find Weakness suffer an additional 30% damage as Shadow]
   1 point  : [(37.325% of Attack Power)] damage
   2 points: [(37.325% of Attack Power) * 2] damage

   5 points: [(37.325% of Attack Power) * 5] damage

[   7 points: [(37.325% of Attack Power) * 7] damage]

196840.name: Frost Shock
196840.description:
Enhancement,  Restoration
Chills the target with frost, causing (72.45% of Spell Power) Frost damage and reducing the target's movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

 Elemental
Chills the target with frost, causing (72.45% of Spell Power) Frost damage and reducing the target's movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

196884.name: Feral Lunge
196884.description: Lunge at your enemy as a ghostly wolf, biting them to deal (10.35% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

197214.name: Sundering
197214.description: Shatters a line of earth in front of you with your main hand weapon, causing (253.92% of Attack Power) Flamestrike damage to any enemy hit.

197625.name: Moonkin Form
197625.description:
Shapeshift into [Glyph of Stars: Astral Form / Moonkin Form], increasing the damage of your spells by 10% and your armor by 125%, and granting protection from Polymorph effects.

The act of shapeshifting frees you from movement impairing effects.

197626.name: Starsurge
197626.description: Launch a surge of stellar energies at the target, dealing (210.1% of Spell Power) Astral damage.

197628.name: Starfire
197628.description: Call down a burst of energy, causing (93% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to the target, and [(93% of Spell Power) * 35 / Warrior of Elune: 45.5 / Wild Surges: 55 / Moon Guardian: 55 / 100] Arcane damage to all other enemies within 5 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

197835.name: Shuriken Storm
197835.description:
Sprays shurikens at all enemies within 10 yards, dealing [(63% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. [Improved Shuriken Storm: Critical strikes with Shuriken Storm apply Find Weakness for 10 sec]

Awards 1 combo point per target hit.

198013.name: Eye Beam
198013.description: Blasts all enemies in front of you, [Looks Can Kill: dealing guaranteed critical strikes] for up to {?a320415[{[(40.26% of Attack Power) * 10 * 2]][{[(40.26% of Attack Power) * 10]] Chaos damage over 2 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. [Furious Gaze: When Eye Beam finishes fully channeling, your Haste is increased by an additional 8% for 8 sec]

198100.name: Kleptomania
198100.description:
Unleash a flurry of disruptive magic onto your target, stealing a beneficial magic effect every 0.5 sec for 4 sec.

Castable while moving, but movement speed is reduced by 40% while channeling.

198103.name: Earth Elemental
198103.description: Calls forth a Greater Earth Elemental to protect you and your allies, generating high threat and taunting enemies periodically for 30 sec.

198589.name: Blur
198589.description: Reduces all damage taken by 25% for 10 sec.

198793.name: Vengeful Retreat
198793.description: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take (16% of Attack Power) Physical damage [Vengeful Bonds: and have their movement speed reduced by 70% for 3 sec].

198898.name: Song of Chi-Ji
198898.description: Conjures a cloud of hypnotic mist that slowly travels forward. Enemies touched by the mist fall asleep, Disoriented for 20 sec.

199261.name: Death Wish
199261.description: Increases your damage taken and done by 10% for 15 sec at the cost of 10% of your health. Stacks up to 5 times.

199483.name: Camouflage
199483.description: You and your pet blend into the surroundings and gain stealth for 1 min. While camouflaged, you will heal for 2% of maximum health every 1 sec.

199736.name: Find Treasure
199736.description: You can sense nearby treasure, making it appear on the minimap. Lasts until canceled.

200025.name: Beacon of Virtue
200025.description:
Apply a Beacon of Light to your target and 4 injured allies within 30 yds for 9 sec.

All affected allies will be healed for 10% of the amount of your other healing done.

200183.name: Apotheosis
200183.description: [Miracle Worker: Gain a charge / Reset the cooldown] of your Holy Words, and enter a pure Holy form for 20 sec, increasing the cooldown reductions to your Holy Words by 200% and reducing their cost by 50%.

200652.name: Tyr's Deliverance
200652.description:
Releases the Light within yourself, healing 5 injured allies instantly and an injured ally every 1 sec within 40 yds for (35.1% of Spell Power).

Allies healed also receive 10% increased healing from your Holy Light, Flash of Light, and Holy Shock spells for 12 sec.

200654.name: Tyr's Deliverance
200654.description:
Releases the Light within yourself, healing 5 injured allies instantly and an injured ally every 1 sec within 40 yds for (35.1% of Spell Power).

Allies healed also receive 10% increased healing from your Holy Light, Flash of Light, and Holy Shock spells for 12 sec.

200758.name: Gloomblade
200758.description:
Punctures your target with your shadow-infused blade for (123% of Attack Power) Shadow damage, bypassing armor. [Improved Backstab: Critical strikes apply Find Weakness for 10 sec]

Awards 1 combo points.

200829.name: Plea
200829.description: A quick, efficient plea to heal an ally for (300% of Spell Power).

201467.name: Fury of the Illidari
201467.description: Throws two demonic glaives in a whirlwind of energy, causing (7 * (38% + 38%)) Chaos damage over 3 sec to all nearby enemies.

201628.name: Fury of the Illidari
201628.description: Throws two demonic glaives in a whirlwind of energy, causing [7 * (38% + 38%)] Chaos damage over 3 sec to all nearby enemies.

201664.name: Demoralizing Roar
201664.description: Demoralizes all enemies within 10 yards, reducing the damage they do by 20% for 8 sec.

201789.name: Fury of the Illidari
201789.description: Throws two demonic glaives in a whirlwind of energy, causing [7 * (38% + 38%)] Chaos damage over 3 sec to all nearby enemies.

202137.name: Sigil of Silence
202137.description:
Place a Sigil of Silence at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Silences all enemies affected by the sigil for 2 sec.

202138.name: Sigil of Chains
202138.description:
Place a Sigil of Chains at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

All enemies affected by the sigil are pulled to its center and are snared, reducing movement speed by 70% for 6 sec.

202162.name: Avert Harm
202162.description: Guard the 4 closest players within 15 yards for 15 sec, allowing you to Stagger 20% of damage they take.

202168.name: Impending Victory
202168.description:
Instantly attack the target, causing (59% of Attack Power) damage and healing you for 30% of your maximum health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Impending Victory and makes it cost no Rage.

202246.name: Overrun
202246.description: Charge to an enemy, stunning them for 3 sec and knocking back their allies within 15 yards.

202335.name: Double Barrel
202335.description: Your next Keg Smash deals 50% additional damage, and stuns all targets it hits for 3 sec.

202370.name: Mighty Ox Kick
202370.description: You perform a Mighty Ox Kick, hurling your enemy a distance behind you.

202719.name: Arcane Torrent
202719.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and generate 15 Fury.

202770.name: Fury of Elune
202770.description:
Balance,  Guardian
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy that follows the enemy, dealing up to [8 * 2 * (18.34% of Spell Power)] Astral damage over 8 sec within its area. Damage reduced on secondary targets.

Generates 40 Astral Power over its duration.

203173.name: Death Chain
203173.description: Chains 3 enemies together, dealing (29.484% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and causing 20% of all damage taken to also be received by the others in the chain. Lasts for 10 sec.

203286.name: Greater Pyroblast
203286.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that deals up to 30% of the target's total health in Fire damage.

203413.name: Fury of the Eagle
203413.description: Furiously strikes all enemies in front of you, dealing [(237.5% of Attack Power) * 9] Physical damage over 3 sec. Critical strike chance increased by 50% against any target below 20% health. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

203415.name: Fury of the Eagle
203415.description: Furiously strikes all enemies in front of you, dealing ((237.5% of Attack Power) * 9) Physical damage over 3 sec. Critical strike chance increased by 50% against any target below 20% health. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

203524.name: Neltharion's Fury
203524.description: Enter a defensive posture, critically blocking all attacks while a stream of shadowflame erupts from Scale of the Earth-Warder, dealing (6 * (18.9% of Attack Power)) Shadowflame over 3 sec to all enemies in front of you. You can use defensive abilities while this is active.

203526.name: Neltharion's Fury
203526.description: Enter a defensive posture, critically blocking all attacks while a stream of shadowflame erupts from Scale of the Earth-Warder, dealing [6 * (18.9% of Attack Power)] Shadowflame over 3 sec to all enemies in front of you. You can use defensive abilities while this is active.

203720.name: Demon Spikes
203720.description: Surge with fel power, increasing your Armor by (75 * Agility / 100) [Demon Spikes: and your Parry chance by 8%, for 12 sec].

204018.name: Blessing of Spellwarding
204018.description:
Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to magical damage and harmful effects for 10 sec.

Cannot be used on a target with Forbearance. Causes Forbearance for 30 sec.

Shares a cooldown with Blessing of Protection.

204019.name: Blessed Hammer
204019.description:
Throws a Blessed Hammer that spirals outward, dealing (25% of Attack Power) Holy damage to enemies and reducing the next damage they deal to you by (Attack Power * 30 / 100).

Generates 1 Holy Power.

204021.name: Fiery Brand
204021.description: Brand yourself and an enemy target with demonic symbols, reducing the damage you take by 40% and instantly dealing (416% of Attack Power) Fire damage [Fiery Brand: and [(32.2% of Attack Power) * 12] Fire damage over 12 sec] to the enemy.

204066.name: Lunar Beam
204066.description:
Summons a beam of lunar light at your target's location, dealing (40% of Attack Power) Arcane damage each second to your target and (40% of Attack Power) to up to 5 other enemies within the beam. 

Lunar Beam also increases your mastery by (14 * $mas)%, and heals you for [(280% of Attack Power) * 8] over 8 sec.

204147.name: Windburst
204147.description: Focuses the power of Wind through Thas'dorah, dealing 272% Physical damage to your target, and leaving behind a trail of wind for 5 sec that increases the movement speed of allies by 50%.

204157.name: Throw Glaive
204157.description: Throw a demonic glaive at the target, dealing (21.151% of Attack Power) Physical damage. The glaive can ricochet to [Bouncing Glaives: 1 additional enemies / an additional enemy] within 10 yards. Generates high threat.

204331.name: Counterstrike Totem
204331.description:
Summons a totem at your feet for 15 sec.

Whenever enemies within (20 * 1 * 1) yards of the totem deal direct damage, the totem will deal 100% of the damage dealt back to attacker.

204336.name: Grounding Totem
204336.description: Summons a totem at your feet that will redirect all harmful spells cast within 30 yards on a nearby party or raid member to itself. Will not redirect area of effect spells. Lasts 3 sec.

204596.name: Sigil of Flame
204596.description:
Place a Sigil of Flame at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Deals (80% of Attack Power) Fire damage, and an additional (200% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 8 sec, to all enemies affected by the sigil.

Generates 25 Fury.

205021.name: Ray of Frost
205021.description:
Channel an icy beam at the enemy for 4 sec, dealing (450% of Spell Power) Frost damage every 0.50 sec.

Applies 8 stacks of Freezing over its duration.

205025.name: Presence of Mind
205025.description: Causes your next 2 Arcane Blasts to be instant cast.

205065.name: Void Torrent
205065.description:
Raise your dagger into the sky, channeling a torrent of void energy into the target for (220% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 4 sec. Insanity does not drain during this channel.

Requires Voidform.

205154.name: Mecha-Bond Imprint Matrix
205154.description: Allows you to tame pets in the Mechanical family.

205180.name: Summon Darkglare
205180.description:
Summons a Darkglare from the Twisting Nether that increases the damage of your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 20% while active.

The Darkglare will serve you for 20 sec, blasting its target for (487.044% of Spell Power) Shadow damage, increased by 10% for every damage over time effect you have active on their current target.

205223.name: Consumption
205223.description: Strikes all enemies in front of you with a hungering attack that deals 87% Physical damage and heals you for 100% of that damage.

205224.name: Consumption
205224.description: Strikes all enemies in front of you with a hungering attack that deals 87% Physical damage and heals you for 100% of that damage.

205273.name: Wake of Ashes
205273.description:
Lash out with the Ashbringer, dealing (174.3% of Attack Power)% Radiant damage to all enemies within 12 yd in front of you, and reducing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

Demon and Undead enemies are stunned for 6 sec if struck by the Wake of Ashes.

205364.name: Dominate Mind
205364.description: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 sec while still controlling your own mind. Does not work versus Demonic, Mechanical, or Undead beings or players. This spell shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

205406.name: Sheilun's Gift
205406.description: Draws in all nearby clouds of mist generated by Sheilun, healing the target for (50% of Spell Power) per cloud absorbed.

205495.name: Stormkeeper
205495.description: Raises The Fist of Ra-den to the sky and absorbs all nearby electric energy, causing your next 3 casts of Lightning Bolt or Chain Lightning to be instant and deal 200% increased damage.

205545.name: Odyn's Fury
205545.description: Unleashes the fiery power Odyn bestowed the Warswords, dealing (91% + 91%) Fire damage and an additional (84% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 4 sec to all enemies within 14 yards.

205546.name: Odyn's Fury
205546.description: Unleashes the fiery power Odyn bestowed the Warswords, dealing (91% + 91%) Fire damage and an additional (84% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 4 sec to all enemies within 14 yards.

205547.name: Odyn's Fury
205547.description: Unleashes the fiery power Odyn bestowed the Warswords, dealing (91% + 91%) Fire damage and an additional (84% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 4 sec to all enemies within 14 yards.

205604.name: Reverse Magic
205604.description: Removes all harmful magical effects from yourself and all nearby allies within 10 yards, and sends them back to their original caster if possible.

205629.name: Demonic Trample
205629.description:
Transform to demon form, moving at 175% increased speed for 3 sec, knocking down all enemies in your path and dealing (16% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

During Demonic Trample you are unaffected by snares but cannot cast spells or use your normal attacks. Shares charges with Infernal Strike.

205630.name: Illidan's Grasp
205630.description:
You strangle the target with demonic magic, stunning them in place and dealing (1120% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 5 sec while the target is grasped. Can move while channeling.

Use Illidan's Grasp again to toss the target to a location within 20 yards.

205636.name: Force of Nature
205636.description:
Summons a stand of 3 Treants for 10 sec which immediately taunt and attack enemies in the targeted area.

Generates 20 Astral Power.

205800.name: Oppressor
205800.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

206572.name: Dragon Charge
206572.description: Run at high speed at a distance in front of you. All enemies in your path will take (70% of Attack Power) Physical damage and be knocked back.

206803.name: Rain from Above
206803.description: You fly into the air out of harm's way. While floating, you gain access to Fel Lance allowing you to deal damage to enemies below.

206930.name: Heart Strike
206930.description: Instantly strike the target and 1 other nearby enemy, causing (157.334% of Attack Power) Physical damage, and reducing enemies' movement speed by 20% for 8 sec [Heart Strike: Generates 5 bonus Runic Power] [Heartbreaker: plus 2 Runic Power per additional enemy struck].

207017.name: Alpha Challenge
207017.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207018.name: Murderous Intent
207018.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207025.name: Admonishment
207025.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207028.name: Inquisition
207028.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207029.name: Tormentor
207029.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207068.name: Titan's Thunder
207068.description: Discharge a massive jolt of electricity from Titanstrike into all your pets and Dire Beasts, causing them to deal up to (Ranged Attack Power * 1.15 * 0.5 * 1) Nature damage to their target every 1 sec. for 8 sec. [Barbed Shot: Also causes the next pet frenzy caused by Barbed Shot to deal (42% of Attack Power) additional Nature damage on each of the 5 attacks]

207097.name: Titan's Thunder
207097.description: Discharge a massive jolt of electricity from Titanstrike into all your pets and Dire Beasts, causing them to deal up to (Ranged Attack Power * 1.15 * 0.5 * 1) Nature damage to their target every 1 sec. for 8 sec. [Barbed Shot: Also causes the next pet frenzy caused by Barbed Shot to deal (42% of Attack Power) additional Nature damage on each of the 5 attacks]

207167.name: Blinding Sleet
207167.description:
Targets in a cone in front of you are blinded, causing them to wander disoriented for 5 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

When Blinding Sleet ends, enemies are slowed by 50% for 6 sec.

207230.name: Frostscythe
207230.description:
A sweeping attack that strikes all enemies in front of you for (40% of Attack Power) Frost damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. 

Consumes Killing Machine to have its critical strikes deal 4 times the normal damage.

207317.name: Epidemic
207317.description:
Causes each of your Virulent Plagues to flare up, dealing (62.5522% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to the infected enemy and (25.0212% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to foes nearby.

Extends the duration of Dread Plague and Virulent Plague by 1.5 sec.

207407.name: Soul Carver
207407.description: Carve into the soul of your target, dealing [(463.5% of Attack Power) + (463.5% of Attack Power)] Fire damage and an additional (300% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 3 sec.  Immediately shatters 3 Soul Fragments from the target and 1 additional Soul Fragment  every 1 sec.

207684.name: Sigil of Misery
207684.description:
Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.

207777.name: Dismantle
207777.description: Disarm the enemy, preventing the use of any weapons or shield for 5 sec.

207778.name: Downpour
207778.description: A burst of water at your Healing Rain's location heals up to 5 injured allies within 12 yards for (323.4% of Spell Power).

207946.name: Light's Wrath
207946.description: Draws upon the power of Light's Wrath, dealing (175% of Spell Power) Radiant damage to the target, increased by 10% per ally affected by your Atonement.

207948.name: Light's Wrath
207948.description: Draws upon the power of Light's Wrath, dealing (175% of Spell Power) Radiant damage to the target, increased by 10% per ally affected by your Atonement.

208065.name: Light of T'uure
208065.description: Applies Light of the Naaru to the target, healing for (100% of Spell Power) and increasing your healing done to that target by 25% for 10 sec.

208253.name: Essence of G'Hanir
208253.description: Release the natural power within G'Hanir to increase the frequency that all of your heal over time effects heal allies by 100% for 8 sec.

208652.name: Dire Beast: Hawk
208652.description: Summons a hawk to circle the target area, attacking all targets within 10 yards over the next 10 sec.

209202.name: Eye of Tyr
209202.description: Releases a blinding flash from Truthguard, causing (56.7% of Attack Power) Holy damage to all nearby enemies within 8 yds and reducing all damage they deal to you by 25% for 9 sec.

209525.name: Soothing Mist
209525.description:
Heals the target for (900% of Spell Power) over 20 sec.

While channeling, Effuse and Enveloping Mist are instant cast, and will heal the soothed target without breaking the Soothing Mist channel.

209577.name: Warbreaker
209577.description: Stomp the ground, causing a ring of corrupted spikes to erupt upwards, dealing 119% Shadow damage and applying the Colossus Smash effect to all nearby enemies.

209749.name: Faerie Swarm
209749.description: Swarms the target with Faeries, disarming the enemy, preventing the use of any weapons or shield and reducing movement speed by 30% for 5 sec.

209997.name: Play Dead
209997.description: Playing Dead, tricking enemies into ignoring them. Lasts up to 6 min.

210000.name: Wake Up
210000.description: Tell your pet to wake up.

210053.name: Mount Form
210053.description:
Shapeshift into a mountable ground travel form, increasing movement speed by 40%. Also protects the caster from Polymorph effects. Only usable outdoors.
