The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of movement impairing effects.

210065.name: Track Beasts
210065.description: Shows the location of all nearby beasts on the minimap.

210128.name: Zombify
210128.description:
Reanimates a nearby corpse, summoning a zombie for 20 sec that slowly moves towards your target. 

If your zombie reaches its target, it explodes after 3.0 sec. The explosion stuns all enemies within 8 yards for 3 sec and deals 10% of their health in Shadow damage.

210256.name: Blessing of Sanctuary
210256.description: Instantly removes all stun, silence, fear and horror effects from the friendly target and reduces the duration of future such effects by 60% for 5 sec.

210722.name: Ashamane's Frenzy
210722.description:
Unleash Ashamane's Frenzy, clawing your target 15 times over 3 sec for ((5.124% of Attack Power) * 15) Physical damage and an additional ((5.124% of Attack Power) * 3 * 15) Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Awards 3 combo points.

210723.name: Ashamane's Frenzy
210723.description:
Unleash Ashamane's Frenzy, clawing your target 15 times over 3 sec for [(5.124% of Attack Power) * 15] Physical damage and an additional [(5.124% of Attack Power) * 3 * 15] Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Awards 3 combo points.

210726.name: Mark of Aluneth
210726.description: Creates a runic prison at the target's location, slowing enemy movement speed by 70%, inflicting [(40% of Spell Power) * 6] Arcane damage over 6 sec, and then detonating for Arcane damage equal to 15% of your maximum mana.

210873.name: Hex
210873.description: Transforms the enemy into a compy for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

211004.name: Hex
211004.description: Transforms the enemy into a spider for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

211010.name: Hex
211010.description: Transforms the enemy into a snake for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

211015.name: Hex
211015.description: Transforms the enemy into a cockroach for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

211076.name: Mark of Aluneth
211076.description: Deals 1 Arcane damage to all targets within 6 yds.

211088.name: Mark of Aluneth
211088.description: Deals (40% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to enemies within 6 yds.

211522.name: Psyfiend
211522.description:
Summons a Psyfiend with [Total Health * (0.04)] health for 12 sec beside you to attack the target at range with Psyflay.

 Psyflay
Deals up to 1% of the target's total health in Shadow damage every 1 sec. Also slows their movement speed by 50% and reduces healing received by 50%.

211714.name: Thal'kiel's Consumption
211714.description: Thal'kiel drains 8% of the life from your demon servants and unleashes a blast of Shadow damage at your current target equal to the life he stole.

211715.name: Thal'kiel's Consumption
211715.description: Thal'kiel drains 8% of the life from your demon servants and unleashes a blast of Shadow damage at your current target equal to the life he stole.

212036.name: Mass Resurrection
212036.description: Brings all dead party members back to life with 35% health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

212040.name: Revitalize
212040.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana. Not castable in combat.

212048.name: Ancestral Vision
212048.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana.  Cannot be cast when in combat.

212051.name: Reawaken
212051.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

212056.name: Absolution
212056.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana.  Cannot be cast when in combat.

212084.name: Fel Devastation
212084.description: Unleash the fel within you, damaging enemies directly in front of you for [(41.1% of Attack Power) * (10)] Fire damage over 2 sec. [Fel Devastation: Causing damage also heals you for up to [(360% of Attack Power) * 10] health]

212182.name: Smoke Bomb
212182.description: Creates a cloud of thick smoke in an 8 yard radius around the Rogue for 5 sec. Enemies are unable to target into or out of the smoke cloud.

212205.name: Create: Crimson Vial
212205.description:
Create a Crimson Vial to share with allies. Maximum of 3 can be carried at once. 

 Crimson Vial
Drink an alchemical concoction that heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 6 sec.

212295.name: Nether Ward
212295.description: Surrounds the caster with a shield that lasts 3 sec, reflecting all harmful spells cast on you.

212431.name: Explosive Shot
212431.description: Fires an explosive shot at your target. After 3 sec, the shot will explode, dealing (582% of Attack Power) Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

212459.name: Call Fel Lord
212459.description: Summon a fel lord to guard the location for 15 sec. Any enemy that comes within 6 yards will suffer [(Spell Power * 2) * 1 * 1 * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage, and players struck will be stunned for 1 sec.

212552.name: Wraith Walk
212552.description:
Embrace the power of the Shadowlands, removing all root effects and increasing your movement speed by 70% for 4 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect.

While active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 170%.

212638.name: Tracker's Net
212638.description: Hurl a net at your enemy, rooting them for 6 sec. While within the net, the target's chance to hit is reduced by 80%. Any damage will break the net.

212640.name: Mending Bandage
212640.description:
Instantly clears all bleeds, poisons, and diseases from the target, and heals for 18% damage over 6 sec.

Being attacked will stop you from using Mending Bandage.

212653.name: Shimmer
212653.description: Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way. Unaffected by the global cooldown and castable while casting.

213634.name: Purify Disease
213634.description: Removes all Disease effects from a friendly target.

213644.name: Cleanse Toxins
213644.description: Cleanses a friendly target, removing all Poison and Disease effects.

213764.name: Swipe
213764.description:
Balance,  Guardian,  Restoration
Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

 Feral
Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

Awards 1 combo point.

213871.name: Bodyguard
213871.description:
Protect an ally, causing 40% of all Physical damage they take to be transfered to you. When the target takes Physical damage, your Shield Slam cooldown has a 30% chance to be reset. Bodyguard is cancelled if the target is further than 20 yards from you. Lasts 1 min.

Only one target can be Bodyguarded at a time.

214634.name: Ebonbolt
214634.description: Deals (321.75% of Spell Power) Shadowfrost damage and causes Brain Freeze.

214743.name: Soul Carver
214743.description: Carve into the soul of your target, dealing [(463.5% of Attack Power) + (463.5% of Attack Power)] Fire damage and an additional (300% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 3 sec.  Immediately shatters 3 Soul Fragments from the target and 1 additional Soul Fragment  every 1 sec.

215279.name: Chaos Bolt
215279.description: Unleashes a devastating blast of chaos, causing (200% of Spell Power) Chaos damage. Chaos Bolt always critically strikes and your critical strike chance increases its damage.

215537.name: Trauma
215537.description: Slam, Whirlwind, and Execute now cause the target to bleed for 20% additional damage over 6 sec. Multiple uses accumulate increased damage.

215652.name: Shield of Virtue
215652.description: When activated, your next Avenger's Shield will interrupt and silence all enemies within 8 yds of the target.

215769.name: Spirit of Redemption
215769.description: The Priest becomes the Spirit of Redemption for 6 sec. The Spirit of Redemption cannot move, attack, be attacked or targeted by any spells or effects. While in this form the Priest can cast any healing spell free of cost.

216698.name: Reap Souls
216698.description:
Consume all Tormented Souls collected by Ulthalesh, increasing your damage by 10% and doubling the effect of all of Ulthalesh's other traits for 5 sec per soul consumed.

Ulthalesh collects Tormented Souls from each target you kill and occasionally escaped souls it previously collected.

217200.name: Barbed Shot
217200.description:
Fire a shot that tears through your enemy, causing them to bleed for [(77.9% of Attack Power) * 5] damage over 12 sec. If Barbed Shot is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Barbed Shot.

Generates (5 * 8 / 2) Focus over 8 sec.

217832.name: Imprison
217832.description: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

218164.name: Detox
218164.description: Removes all Poison and Disease effects from the target.

220143.name: Apocalypse
220143.description: Strikes the enemy, dealing 306% Physical damage and bursting up to 6 Festering Wounds on the target, summoning a member of your Army of the Dead for 20 sec for each burst Festering Wound.

221562.name: Asphyxiate
221562.description: Lifts the enemy target off the ground, crushing their throat with dark energy and stunning them for 5 sec.

224869.name: Teleport: Dalaran - Broken Isles
224869.description: Teleports you to Dalaran in the Broken Isles.

224871.name: Portal: Dalaran - Broken Isles
224871.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Dalaran in the Broken Isles.

224968.name: Mark of Aluneth
224968.description: Creates a rune around the target, inflicting ((40% of Spell Power) * 6) Arcane damage over 6 sec to all enemies within 6 yds, and then detonating for Arcane damage equal to 20% of your maximum mana.

227847.name: Bladestorm
227847.description:
Fury
Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force, striking all nearby enemies for [5 * (271.635% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage over 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects, but can use defensive abilities and can avoid attacks.

Generates 5 Rage on each strike.

 Arms
Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force, striking all nearby enemies for [7 * (271.635% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage over 6 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects, but can use defensive abilities and can avoid attacks.

228049.name: Guardian of the Forgotten Queen
228049.description: Empowers the friendly target with the spirit of the forgotten queen, causing the target to be immune to all damage for until canceled.

228260.name: Voidform
228260.description:
Bombards your target with a Void Volley and twists your Shadowform with void magic, increasing your spell damage by 20% for 20 sec. 

This spell is replaced with Void Volley while Voidform is active.

 Void Volley
Releases a volley of pure void energy, firing 10 bolts at your target and 1 bolt at all enemies within 10 yards of your target for (106.049% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

Generates 10 Insanity.

228477.name: Soul Cleave
228477.description:
Viciously strike an enemy and all other enemies in front of you for (208% of Attack Power) Physical damage and heal yourself for (240% of Attack Power). Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Consumes up to 2 Soul Fragments, increasing damage by 20% per fragment consumed.

228920.name: Ravager
228920.description:
Arms
Throws a whirling weapon at your target that chases nearby enemies, inflicting [6 * (119.517% of Attack Power)] Physical damage to all enemies over 12 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Cleave and Whirlwind deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active

 Protection
Throws a whirling weapon at your target that chases nearby enemies, inflicting [6 * (119.517% of Attack Power)] Physical damage to all enemies over 12 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Revenge and Thunder Clap deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active.

Generates 10 Rage each time it deals damage.

229533.name: Track Mechanicals
229533.description: Shows the location of all nearby mechanicals on the minimap.

232633.name: Arcane Torrent
232633.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 3% of your mana.

232698.name: Shadowform
232698.description: Assume a Shadowform, increasing your spell damage dealt by 10%.

232893.name: Felblade
232893.description:
Charge to your target and deal (122.94% of Attack Power)% Fire damage.

 [Fracture: Generates 15 Fury.] [Demonic Wards: Generates 15 Fury.]Generates 15 Fury.

233759.name: Grapple Weapon
233759.description: You fire off a rope spear, grappling the target's weapons and shield, returning them to you for 5 sec.

234153.name: Drain Life
234153.description: Drains life from the target, causing 25 Shadow damage over 5 sec, and healing you for 500% of the damage done.

235219.name: Cold Snap
235219.description: Resets the cooldown of your Ice Barrier, Frost Nova, Cone of Cold, Ice Cold, and Ice Block.

235313.name: Blazing Barrier
235313.description:
Shields you in flame, absorbing [30 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage [Molten Skin: and reducing Physical damage taken by 0%] for 1 min.

Melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take (14.375% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

235450.name: Prismatic Barrier
235450.description:
Shields you with an arcane force, absorbing [30 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage and reducing magic damage taken by 15% for 1 min.

The duration of harmful Magic effects against you is reduced by 25%.

236077.name: Disarm
236077.description: Disarm the enemy's weapons and shield for 5 sec. Disarmed creatures deal significantly reduced damage.

236273.name: Duel
236273.description: You challenge the target to a duel. While challenged, all damage you and the target deal to all targets other than each other is reduced by 50%. Lasts 12 sec.

236716.name: Strength of the Wild
236716.description: Maul the target for 8% of the target's maximum health in Physical damage.

242155.name: Hybrid Kinship
242155.description: Learn the secrets of taming Feathermanes.

247454.name: Spirit Bomb
247454.description: Consume up to 5 Soul Fragments then explode, dealing (200% of Attack Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased by 20 / Soulcrush: 28 / Untethered Rage: 25% per fragment consumed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

252216.name: Tiger Dash
252216.description: Shift into Cat Form and increase your movement speed by 200%, reducing gradually over 5 sec.

255647.name: Light's Judgment
255647.description: Call down a strike of Holy energy, dealing [Attack Power * 4.2 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Holy damage to enemies within 10 yards after 3 sec. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

255654.name: Bull Rush
255654.description: Charge forward for 1 sec, knocking enemies down for 1.5 sec.

255661.name: Cantrips
255661.description: Conjure up an Eldritch Grimoire, allowing you mail access for 1.5 min.

255937.name: Wake of Ashes
255937.description:
Lash out at your enemies, dealing (321.86% of Attack Power) Radiant damage to all enemies within 14 yds in front of you, and applying Truth's Wake, burning the targets for an additional [(65.28% of Attack Power) * (2.73077)] damage over 9 sec.

Demon and Undead enemies are also stunned for 5 sec.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

256948.name: Spatial Rift
256948.description: Tear a rift in space. Reactivate this ability to teleport through the rift.

257044.name: Rapid Fire
257044.description:
Shoot a stream of 7 / Double Tap: 13 / Quick Draw: 10 shots at your target over 2 sec, dealing a total of [7 / Double Tap: 12.6 / Quick Draw: 10 * (72.6% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage. Usable while moving.

Each shot generates 3 / Double Tap: 5 / Quick Draw: 6 Focus.

257284.name: Hunter's Mark
257284.description:
Apply Hunter's Mark to the target, causing the target to always be seen and tracked by the Hunter.

Hunter's Mark increases the target's damage taken by 3%. Can only be applied to a target at a time.

257620.name: Multi-Shot
257620.description: Fires several missiles, hitting your current target and all enemies within 10 yards for (181.6% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. [Lethal Shots: Multi-Shot has a 30% chance to reduce the cooldown of Rapid Fire by 5.0 sec]

258860.name: Essence Break
258860.description: Slash all enemies in front of you for (311% of Attack Power) Chaos damage, causing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance to deal (198% of Attack Power) Chaos damage to them for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

258920.name: Immolation Aura
258920.description:
Havoc
Engulf yourself in flames, radiating [(13.55% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.
[
Generates 20 Fury.]

 Devourer
Engulf yourself in flames, radiating [(13.55% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.
[
Generates 20 Fury.]

 Vengeance
Engulf yourself in flames, radiating [(13.55% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.
[
Generates 20 Fury.]

Generates 20 Fury over 6 sec.

259489.name: Kill Command
259489.description:
Give the command to kill, causing your pet to savagely deal (300% of Attack Power) Physical damage to the enemy.

Generates 15 / Invigorating Pulse: 20 / Flanker's Advantage: 20 Focus.

259495.name: Wildfire Bomb
259495.description:
Hurl a bomb at the target, exploding for (157.95% of Attack Power) Fire damage in a cone and coating enemies in wildfire, scorching them for (125.928% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 6 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Deals 80% increased damage to your primary target.

260243.name: Volley
260243.description: Rain a volley of arrows down over 6 sec, dealing up to [(140% of Attack Power) * 12] Physical damage to any enemy in the area, and gain the effects of Trick Shots for as long as Volley is active.

260364.name: Arcane Pulse
260364.description: Deals (Attack Power * 1.5) Arcane damage to nearby enemies and reduces their movement speed by 80%. Lasts 8 sec.

260643.name: Skullsplitter
260643.description:
Bash an enemy's skull, dealing (202.488% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

Skullsplitter causes your Rend and Deep Wounds on the target to bleed out 100% faster for 10 sec.

Generates (150 / 10) Rage.

260708.name: Sweeping Strikes
260708.description: Your next 12 damaging single-target abilities hit 1 additional target within 8 yds for 75% damage. Lasts 30 sec.

262161.name: Warbreaker
262161.description: Smash the ground and shatter the armor of all enemies within 10 yds, dealing (306.263% of Attack Power) Physical damage and increasing damage you deal to them by 30% for 10 sec.

263165.name: Void Torrent
263165.description:
Channel a torrent of void energy into the target, dealing (713.055% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 3 sec and tearing open an Entropic Rift.

 Entropic Rift
Mind Blast tears open an Entropic Rift that follows the enemy for 8 sec. Enemies caught in its path suffer (60% of Spell Power) Shadow damage every 1 sec while within its reach.

Generates 24 Insanity over the duration.

263642.name: Fracture
263642.description:
Rapidly slash your target for [(103.5% of Attack Power)% + (207% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage, and shatter 2 Lesser Soul Fragments from them.

Generates 25 Fury.

264130.name: Power Siphon
264130.description: Instantly sacrifice up to 2 Wild Imps, generating 2 charges of Demonic Core that cause Demonbolt to deal 30% additional damage.

264735.name: Survival of the Fittest
264735.description: Reduces all damage you and your pet take by 30% for 6 sec.

265187.name: Summon Demonic Tyrant
265187.description:
Summon a Demonic Tyrant that damages your target for 15 sec. 

Damage dealt by Demonic Tyrant is increased by 10% for each Wild Imp and Dreadstalker active. [Soulbound Tyrant: Generates 0 Soul Shards.]

265221.name: Fireblood
265221.description: Removes all poison, disease, curse, magic, and bleed effects and increases your primary stat by (84 * 3) and an additional 84 for each effect removed. Lasts 8 sec.

269352.name: Hex
269352.description: Transforms the enemy into a skeletal hatchling for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

269513.name: Death from Above
269513.description:
Finishing move that empowers your weapons with energy to perform a deadly attack.

You leap into the air and [Envenom] [Dispatch / Eviscerate] your target on the way back down, with such force that it has a 15% stronger effect.

271877.name: Blade Rush
271877.description:
Charge to your target with your blades out, dealing [(375.3% of Attack Power)% * 230 / 100] Physical damage to the target and (375.3% of Attack Power)% to all other nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8% targets.

While Blade Flurry is active, damage to non-primary targets is increased by 100%.

Generates 25 Energy over 5 sec.

272651.name: Command Pet
272651.description:
Commands your pet to perform its unique ability. This ability will transform based on the specialization of your active pet. 

Ferocity: Primal Rage
Tenacity: Fortitude of the Bear
Cunning: Master's Call

274281.name: New Moon
274281.description:
Deals (258.4% of Spell Power) Astral damage to the target and empowers New Moon to become Half Moon. 

Generates 10 Astral Power.

274738.name: Ancestral Call
274738.description: Invoke the spirits of your ancestors, granting you 225 of one of your two highest secondary stat for 15 sec.

274837.name: Feral Frenzy
274837.description:
Unleash a furious frenzy, clawing your target 5 times for [(16.3% of Attack Power) * 5] Physical damage and an additional [5 * (32.67% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Awards 5 combo points.

275773.name: Judgment
275773.description: Judges the target, dealing (123.75% of Spell Power) Holy damage [Greater Judgment: and preventing [(Shadow spell power * 483 / 100) * (1 + Versatility)] damage dealt by the target]. [Judgment: Generates 1 Holy Power.]

275779.name: Judgment
275779.description: Judges the target, dealing (190% of Spell Power) Holy damage [Greater Judgment: and causing them to take 20% increased damage from your next Holy Power ability].

277778.name: Hex
277778.description: Transforms the enemy into a Zandalari Tendonripper for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

277784.name: Hex
277784.description: Transforms the enemy into a wicker mongrel for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

277787.name: Polymorph
277787.description:
Transforms the enemy into a baby direhorn, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

277792.name: Polymorph
277792.description:
Transforms the enemy into a bumblebee, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

278326.name: Consume Magic
278326.description: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target [Swallowed Anger: and granting you 20 Fury].

279302.name: Frostwyrm's Fury
279302.description: Summons a frostwyrm who breathes on all enemies within 40 yd in front of you, dealing (370.75% of Attack Power) Frost damage, stunning enemies for 3 sec, and slowing movement speed by 50% for 10 sec.

280719.name: Secret Technique
280719.description:
Finishing move that creates shadow clones of yourself. You and your shadow clones each perform a piercing attack on all enemies near your target, dealing Physical damage to the primary target and reduced damage to other targets.
   1 point  : [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 3] total damage
   2 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 2 * 3] total damage
   3 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 3 * 3] total damage
   4 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 4 * 3] total damage
   5 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 5 * 3] total damage
[   6 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 6 * 3] total damage]
[   7 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 7 * 3] total damage]

281400.name: Portal: Boralus
281400.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Boralus.

281402.name: Portal: Dazar'alor
281402.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Dazar'alor.

281954.name: Pterrordax Swoop
281954.description: Reduces your falling speed for 2 min.

285381.name: Primal Wrath
285381.description:
Finishing move that deals instant damage and applies Rip to all enemies within 10 yards. Lasts longer per combo point.

   1 point  : [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 2] plus Rip for (2 * 2) sec
   2 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 3] plus Rip for (2 * 3) sec
   3 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 4] plus Rip for (2 * 4) sec
   4 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 5] plus Rip for (2 * 5) sec
   5 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 6] plus Rip for (2 * 6) sec

287712.name: Haymaker
287712.description: Wind up, then unleash your might upon your foe, dealing [Attack Power * 0.75 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage, stunning for 3 sec, and knocking them back substantially.

288613.name: Trueshot
288613.description:
Increases your critical strike chance by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 15 sec.

 Aimed Shot
Cooldown recovers 40% faster.

 Rapid Fire
Cooldown recovers 60% faster.
[
Applies Spotter's Mark.]

289666.name: Greater Heal
289666.description: An exceptional spell that heals an ally for 40% of their maximum health, ignoring healing reduction effects.

290608.name: Crusader's Direhorn
290608.description: Summons a Crusader's Direhorn, which serves as a mount.

291944.name: Regeneratin'
291944.description: Regenerate 50% of your maximum health over 6 sec, interrupted by direct damage.

292752.name: Embrace of the Loa
292752.description:
Choose your Loa by making an offering at Loa Shrines around the world. 

Each Loa offers unique powers. Guards in Dazar'alor will tell you where Shrines can be found.

305483.name: Lightning Lasso
305483.description: Grips the target in lightning, stunning and dealing (3850% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 5 sec while the target is lassoed. Can move while channeling.

309328.name: Hex
309328.description: Transforms the enemy into a living honey for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

312411.name: Bag of Tricks
312411.description: Pull your chosen trick from the bag and use it on target enemy or ally. Enemies take [Attack Power * 2.52 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] damage and are snared by 80% for 4 sec, while allies are healed for [Attack Power * 3.78 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] and move 20% faster for 4 sec.

312425.name: Rummage Your Bag
312425.description: Change the contents of your Bag of Tricks. Now where did you put that...?

315341.name: Between the Eyes
315341.description:
Finishing move that blasts your target with your pistol, dealing Physical damage and increasing your damage dealt by 4%. Multiple instances of this bonus can overlap.
   1 point : [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power)] damage, 4 sec
   2 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 2] damage, 6 sec
   3 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 3] damage, 8 sec
   4 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 4] damage, 10 sec
   5 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 5] damage, 12 sec
[   6 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 6] damage, 14 sec]
[   7 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 7] damage, 16 sec]

315496.name: Slice and Dice
315496.description:
Finishing move that consumes combo points to increase attack speed by 50%. Lasts longer per combo point.
   1 point  : 12 seconds
   2 points: 18 seconds
   3 points: 24 seconds
   4 points: 30 seconds
   5 points: 36 seconds
[   6 points: 42 seconds]
[   7 points: 48 seconds]

315584.name: Instant Poison
315584.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts (7.4% of Attack Power) Nature damage.

315720.name: Onslaught
315720.description:
Brutally attack an enemy for (413.868% of Attack Power) Physical damage [Tenderize: and become Enraged for 4 sec / .]

Generates (300 / 10) Rage.

316239.name: Rune Strike
316239.description: Strike the target for (60% of Attack Power) Physical damage. This attack cannot be dodged, blocked, or parried.

316440.name: Martial Prowess
316440.description: Overpower and Slam increase the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 5%, stacking up to 3 times.

318038.name: Flametongue Weapon
318038.description:
Enhancement
Imbue your weapon with the element of Fire for 1 hour, causing each of your attacks to deal (3.96% of Attack Power) additional Fire damage.

 Elemental
Imbue your weapon with the element of Fire for 1 hour, increasing the damage of your Fire spells by 5.0%.

319175.name: Black Powder
319175.description:
Finishing move that launches explosive Black Powder at all nearby enemies dealing Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. [Shadowed Finishers: All nearby targets with your Find Weakness suffer an additional 30% damage as Shadow]

   1 point  : [(18.5% of Attack Power)] damage
   2 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 2] damage
   3 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 3] damage
   4 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 4] damage
   5 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 5] damage
[   6 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 6] damage]
[   7 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 7] damage]

319836.name: Fire Blast
319836.description: Blasts the enemy for (82.8% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

320747.name: Surge of Earth
320747.description: Consume up to 3 charges of Earth Shield to heal up to 3 allies near your Earth Shield target for [(250% of Spell Power) / 3 * (1 + Versatility)] per charge consumed.

321297.name: Eyes of the Beast
321297.description: Take direct control of your pet and see through its eyes for 1 min.

321395.name: Polymorph
321395.description:
Transforms the enemy into a mawrat, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Undead, Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

321507.name: Touch of the Magi
321507.description:
Applies Touch of the Magi to your current target, accumulating 20% of the damage you deal to the target for 12 sec, and then exploding for that amount of Arcane damage to the target and reduced damage to all nearby enemies.

Generates 4 Arcane Charges.

322101.name: Expel Harm
322101.description: Expel negative chi from your body, healing for (120% of Spell Power) and dealing 10% of the amount healed as Nature damage to an enemy within 20 yards. [Expel Harm: Draws in the positive chi of all your Healing Spheres to increase the healing of Expel Harm] [Reverse Harm: Generates [(120% of Spell Power) + 30] Chi.]

322109.name: Touch of Death
322109.description:
You exploit the enemy target's weakest point, instantly dealing damage equal to 100% of your maximum health to [Improved Touch of Death: creatures if they have less health than you / them.

Only usable on creatures that have less health than you] [Deals damage equal to 35% of your maximum health against players and stronger creatures under 15% health / .] [Touch of Death: Reduces delayed Stagger damage by 200% of damage dealt] [Spawns 3 Chi Spheres, granting 1 Chi when you walk through them] [Increases the Monk's Physical damage by 15% for 10 sec]

322118.name: Invoke Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent
322118.description:
Summons an effigy of Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent for 25 sec. Yu'lon will heal injured allies with Soothing Breath, healing the target and up to 2 allies for (210% of Spell Power) over 4.5 sec. 

Enveloping Mist costs 50% less mana while Yu'lon is active.

322507.name: Celestial Brew
322507.description: A swig of strong brew that coalesces purified chi escaping your body into a celestial guard, absorbing 0 damage.

322729.name: Spinning Crane Kick
322729.description: Spin while kicking in the air, dealing [4 * (10% of Attack Power)] Physical damage over 1.5 sec to enemies within 8 yds. [Spinning Crane Kick: Dealing damage with Spinning Crane Kick grants Shuffle for 1 sec, and your Healing Spheres travel towards you]

325028.name: Death Chakram
325028.description:
Throw a deadly chakram at your current target that will rapidly deal (31.6% of Attack Power) Shadow damage 7 times, bouncing to other targets if they are nearby. Enemies struck by Death Chakram take 10% more Physical damage from you and your pet for 10 sec.

Each time the chakram deals damage, its damage is increased by 15% and you generate 3 Focus.

325037.name: Death Chakram
325037.description:
Throw a deadly chakram at your current target that will rapidly deal (31.6% of Attack Power) Shadow damage 7 times, bouncing to other targets if they are nearby. Enemies struck by Death Chakram take 10% more Physical damage from you and your pet for 10 sec.

Each time the chakram deals damage, its damage is increased by 15% and you generate 3 Focus.

325153.name: Exploding Keg
325153.description:
Hurls a flaming keg at the target location, dealing (380% of Attack Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies, causing your attacks against them to deal (30% of Attack Power) additional Fire damage, and causing their melee attacks to deal 100% reduced damage for the next 3 sec.

Resets the cooldown of Keg Smash.

325197.name: Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane
325197.description:
Summon an effigy of Chi-Ji for 25 sec that kicks up 3 Gust of Mists when you Blackout Kick, Rising Sun Kick, or Spinning Crane Kick, healing up to 2 allies for [(0.1% of Spell Power) * 50 / 100].

Chi-Ji's presence makes you immune to movement impairing effects, makes Enveloping Mist instant cast, and reduces the mana cost of Enveloping Mist by 20%.

327163.name: Primordial Wave
327163.description:
Restoration
Blast your target with a Primordial Wave, dealing (65% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and apply Flame Shock to an enemy, or heal an ally for (65% of Spell Power) and apply Riptide to them.

Your next Healing Wave will also hit all targets affected by your Riptide for 60% of normal healing.

 Elemental
Blast your target with a Primordial Wave, dealing (65% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and apply Flame Shock to an enemy, or heal an ally for (65% of Spell Power).

Your next Lava Burst will also hit all targets affected by your Flame Shock for 80% of normal damage.

 Enhancement
Blast your target with a Primordial Wave, dealing (65% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and apply Flame Shock to an enemy, or heal an ally for (65% of Spell Power).

Your next Lightning Bolt will also hit all targets affected by your Flame Shock for 150% of normal damage.

328928.name: Fae Transfusion
328928.description:
Transfer the life force of up to 4 enemies in the targeted area, dealing [((117.5% of Spell Power) * 3 / 0.5) + (117.5% of Spell Power)] Nature damage evenly split to each enemy target over 3 sec. [ Enhancement: Fully channeling Fae Transfusion generates 3 stacks of Maelstrom Weapon]

Pressing Fae Transfusion again within 20 sec will release 60% of all damage from Fae Transfusion, healing up to 4 allies within 20 yds.

328930.name: Fae Transfusion
328930.description:
Transfer the life force of up to 4 enemies in the targeted area, dealing [((117.5% of Spell Power) * 3 / 0.5) + (117.5% of Spell Power)] Nature damage evenly split to each enemy target over 3 sec. [ Enhancement: Fully channeling Fae Transfusion generates 3 stacks of Maelstrom Weapon]

Pressing Fae Transfusion again within 20 sec will release 60% of all damage from Fae Transfusion, healing up to 4 allies within 20 yds.

329042.name: Emerald Slumber
329042.description:
Embrace the Emerald Dream, causing you to enter a deep slumber for 8 sec. While sleeping, all other cooldowns recover 400% faster, and allies within 40 yds are healed for 0 every 1 sec.

Direct damage taken may awaken you.

333889.name: Fel Domination
333889.description: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

334275.name: Curse of Exhaustion
334275.description:
Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

335467.name: Shadow Word: Madness
335467.description:
A word of madness haunts the target's mind, dealing (227.5% of Spell Power) Shadow damage instantly plus an additional 9 Shadow damage over 6 sec. Heals you for 30% of damage dealt.

When reapplied to a target, all remaining damage is added to the new effect.

342245.name: Alter Time
342245.description: Alters the fabric of time, returning you to your current location and health when cast a second time, or after 10 sec. Effect negated by long distance or death.

342601.name: Ritual of Doom
342601.description: Begins a ritual that sacrifices a random participant to summon a doomguard. Requires the caster and 4 additional party members to complete the ritual.

343127.name: Teleport
343127.description: Teleports you to a major city.

343140.name: Portal
343140.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to a Major City.

343294.name: Soul Reaper
343294.description:
Rupture the soul of your enemy, dealing (450% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and causing the foe to take 20% increased damage from your diseases and minions for 8 sec.

Only usable on enemies below 35% maximum health.

Consumes up to 2 available charges to cast Putrefy.

343527.name: Execution Sentence
343527.description:
Unleash a heavenly blast around the target, dealing (505.312% of Attack Power) Holy damage to all enemies nearby, and call down a hammer that slowly falls from the sky upon the target. 

After 10 sec, they suffer 20% of the Holy damage you dealt to all targets affected by the initial blast during that time.

344572.name: Bestial Wrath
344572.description: Sends you and your pet into a rage, instantly dealing (800% of Attack Power) Physical damage to its target, and increasing all damage you both deal by 20% for 15 sec. Removes all crowd control effects from your pet. [Scent of Blood: Activating Bestial Wrath grants 0 charges of Barbed Shot]

344597.name: Portal: Oribos
344597.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Oribos.

344859.name: Demon's Bite
344859.description:
Quickly attack for (105.05% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

Generates 20 to 30 Fury.

344862.name: Chaos Strike
344862.description: Slice your target for [(69.432% of Attack Power) + (109.12% of Attack Power)] Chaos damage. Chaos Strike has a [Min(20, 100)]% chance to refund 20 Fury.

344865.name: Fel Rush
344865.description: Rush forward, incinerating anything in your path for (43.4673% of Attack Power) Chaos damage.

351338.name: Quell
351338.description: Interrupt an enemy's spellcasting and prevent any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 6 sec.

352278.name: Ice Wall
352278.description: Conjures an Ice Wall 30 yards long that obstructs line of sight. The wall has 30% of your maximum health and lasts up to 15 sec.

353082.name: Ring of Fire
353082.description: Summons a Ring of Fire for 8 sec at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are disoriented and burn for 3% of their total health over 3 sec.

353128.name: Arcanosphere
353128.description: Builds a sphere of Arcane energy, gaining power over 4 sec. Upon release, the sphere passes through any barriers, knocking enemies back and dealing up to [(735% of Spell Power) * 4] Arcane damage.

353294.name: Shadow Rift
353294.description:
Conjure a Shadow Rift at the target location lasting 2 sec. Enemy players within the rift when it expires are teleported to your Demonic Circle.

Must be within 40 yds of your Demonic Circle to cast.

353753.name: Bonds of Fel
353753.description: Encircle enemy players with Bonds of Fel. If any affected player leaves the 8 yd radius they explode, dealing (728% of Spell Power) Fire damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

354540.name: Nimble Brew
354540.description: Douse allies in the targeted area with Nimble Brew, preventing the next full loss of control effect within 8 sec.

354654.name: Grove Protection
354654.description: Summon a grove to protect allies in the area for 10 sec, reducing damage taken by 50% from enemies outside the grove.

354831.name: Wailing Arrow
354831.description: Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing (277.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to your target and an additional (112.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Targets struck by a Wailing Arrow are silenced for 5 sec.

355580.name: Static Field Totem
355580.description: Summons a totem with 4% of your health at the target location for 6 sec that forms a circuit of electricity that enemies cannot pass through.

355589.name: Wailing Arrow
355589.description: Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing (277.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to your target and an additional (112.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Targets struck by a Wailing Arrow are silenced for 5 sec.

355596.name: Wailing Arrow
355596.description: Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing (277.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to your target and an additional (112.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Targets struck by a Wailing Arrow are silenced for 5 sec.

355897.name: Inner Light
355897.description:
[Inner Light: Embrace the light, reducing the mana cost of healing spells by 10% /  Inner Light: Healing spells cost 10% less mana.

Inner Shadow: Spell damage and Atonement healing increased by 10%.

Activate to swap from one effect to the other, incurring a 6 sec cooldown.]

355913.name: Emerald Blossom
355913.description: Grow a bulb from the Emerald Dream at an ally's location. After 1.5 sec, heal up to 3 injured allies within 10 yds for (323% of Spell Power).

355936.name: Dream Breath
355936.description:
Inhale, gathering the power of the Dream. Release to exhale, healing yourself and 5 injured allies in a 40 yd cone in front of you for [(184.32% of Spell Power) + (30.72% of Spell Power) * (8 + 0)].

I:   Heals (184.32% of Spell Power) instantly and [(30.72% of Spell Power) * (8 + 0)] over (16 + 0) sec.

II:  Heals [(184.32% of Spell Power) + (30.72% of Spell Power) * 2] instantly and [(30.72% of Spell Power) * (6 + 0)] over (12 + 0) sec.

III: Heals [(184.32% of Spell Power) + (30.72% of Spell Power) * 4] instantly and [(30.72% of Spell Power) * (4 + 0)] over (8 + 0) sec.

356707.name: Wild Kingdom
356707.description: Call in help from one of your dismissed Cunning pets for 10 sec. Your current pet is dismissed to rest and heal 30% of maximum health.

356719.name: Chimaeral Sting
356719.description:
Stings the target, dealing (150% of Attack Power) Nature damage and initiating a series of venoms. Each lasts 3 sec and applies the next effect after the previous one ends.

 Scorpid Venom:
90% reduced movement speed.

 Spider Venom:
Silenced.

 Viper Venom:
20% reduced damage and healing.

356995.name: Disintegrate
356995.description: Tear into an enemy with a blast of blue magic, inflicting (475.53% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage over 3 sec, and slowing their movement speed by 50% for 3 sec.

357170.name: Time Dilation
357170.description: Stretch time around an ally for the next 8 sec, causing 50% of damage they would take to instead be dealt over 8 sec.

357208.name: Fire Breath
357208.description:
Inhale, stoking your inner flame. Release to exhale, burning enemies in a cone in front of you for [((163.409% of Spell Power)) + ((39.4834% of Spell Power) * (10 + 0 + 0))] Fire damage, reduced beyond 5 targets. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 2 sec]

Empowering causes more of the damage to be dealt immediately instead of over time.

I:   Deals [(163.409% of Spell Power)] damage instantly and [(39.4834% of Spell Power) * (10 + 0 + 0)] over (20 + 0 + 0) sec.

II:  Deals [(163.409% of Spell Power) + ((39.4834% of Spell Power) * 3)] damage instantly and [(39.4834% of Spell Power) * (7 + 0 + 0)] over (14 + 0 + 0) sec.

III: Deals [(163.409% of Spell Power) + ((39.4834% of Spell Power) * 6)] damage instantly and [(39.4834% of Spell Power) * (4 + 0 + 0)] over (8 + 0 + 0) sec.

357210.name: Deep Breath
357210.description:
Take in a deep breath and fly to the targeted location, spewing molten cinders dealing (400% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage to enemies in your path.

Removes all root effects. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects while flying. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 5 sec]

357211.name: Pyre
357211.description: Lob a ball of flame, dealing (400.277% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your target and all enemies within 8 yds.

357214.name: Wing Buffet
357214.description: With a powerful flap of your wings, knock away enemies in front of you.

358267.name: Hover
358267.description:
Launch yourself and gain 30% increased movement speed for (6 + 0) sec.

Allows Evoker spells to be cast while moving and is castable while casting. Does not affect empowered spells.

358385.name: Landslide
358385.description: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

358733.name: Glide
358733.description:
Reduces your falling speed.

You can activate this ability with the jump key while falling.

359053.name: Smoke Bomb
359053.description: Creates a cloud of thick smoke in an 8 yard radius around the Rogue for 5 sec. Enemies are unable to target into or out of the smoke cloud.

359073.name: Eternity Surge
359073.description:
Focus your energies to release a salvo of pure magic, dealing [(1088.47% of Spell Power)] Spellfrost damage to an enemy. Damages additional enemies within 25 yds when empowered.

I:   Damages [Eternity's Span: 2 enemies enemy].

II:  Damages [Eternity's Span: 4 enemies / 2 enemies].

III: Damages [Eternity's Span: 6 enemies / 3 enemies].

359816.name: Dream Flight
359816.description:
Take in a deep breath and fly to the targeted location, healing all allies in your path for (500% of Spell Power) immediately, and (1000% of Spell Power) over 15 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Removes all root effects. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

Damage taken while you are flying is absorbed, up to 100% of your maximum health.

360194.name: Deathmark
360194.description:
Carve a deathmark into an enemy, dealing (320% of Attack Power) Bleed damage and restoring (10 * 8) Energy to you over 16 sec. Damage dealt to the target by your Garrote, Rupture, and Lethal Poisons is increased by 100%.

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to the target, apply it twice.

360806.name: Sleep Walk
360806.description: Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.

360823.name: Naturalize
360823.description: Cleanses harmful effects from the target, removing all Magic and Poison effects.

360827.name: Blistering Scales
360827.description:
Protect an ally with 15 explosive dragonscales, increasing their Armor by 20% of your own.

Melee attacks against the target cause 1 scale to explode, dealing [$INT * 0.3 * (1 + Versatility) * Percent Damage] Volcanic damage to enemies near them. This damage can only occur every few sec.

Blistering Scales can only be placed on one target at a time. Casts on your enemy's target if they have one.

360995.name: Verdant Embrace
360995.description: Fly to an ally and heal them for (1058% of Spell Power), or heal yourself for the same amount.

361021.name: Sense Power
361021.description: Gauge the magical energy of your allies, showing you when they are using an exceptionally powerful ability.

361178.name: Mass Return
361178.description: Brings all dead party members back to life with 35% health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

361469.name: Living Flame
361469.description:
Send a flickering flame towards your target, [ Preservation: healing an ally for (600% of Spell Power) or dealing (232.001% of Spell Power) Fire damage to an enemy / 

 Devastation,  Augmentation
dealing (232.001% of Spell Power) Fire damage to an enemy or healing an ally for (600% of Spell Power)]

362969.name: Azure Strike
362969.description: Project intense energy onto 2 enemies, dealing (163.185% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage to them.

363534.name: Rewind
363534.description:
Rewind 30% of damage taken in the last 5 seconds by all allies within 40 yds. Always heals for at least (Spell Power * 0.4 * 5).

Healing increased by 200% when not in a raid.

363916.name: Obsidian Scales
363916.description: Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% [Renewing Blaze: and causing you to be healed over 8 sec equal to the damage it prevented]. Lasts 12 sec.

364342.name: Blessing of the Bronze
364342.description: Weave the threads of time, reducing the cooldown of a major movement ability for all party and raid members by 15% for 1 hour.

364343.name: Echo
364343.description: Wrap an ally with temporal energy, healing them for (240% of Spell Power) and causing your next healing spell to cast an additional time on that ally at [ceil(70 / Time Lord: 105 / Golden Opportunity: 77)]% of normal healing. Essence spells cannot be Echoed.

365350.name: Arcane Surge
365350.description:
Expend all of your current mana to annihilate your enemy target and nearby enemies for up to [(372% of Spell Power) * 2] Arcane damage based on Mana spent. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

For the next 15 sec, your Mana regeneration is increased by 425% and spell damage is increased by 35%.

Generates Clearcasting.

365585.name: Expunge
365585.description: Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.

366155.name: Reversion
366155.description:
Reverse an ally's injuries, [Golden Hour: instantly healing them for 15% of damage taken in the last 5 sec and an additional / healing them for] (256.5% of Spell Power) over 12 sec.

When Reversion critically heals, its duration is extended by 2 sec, up to a maximum of 12 sec.

368970.name: Tail Swipe
368970.description: Lash out with your tail, knocking enemies within 8 yds into the air.

369459.name: Source of Magic
369459.description: Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.

369536.name: Soar
369536.description: Muster your strength and launch into the air.

370388.name: Swoop Up
370388.description: Grab an enemy and fly with them to the target location.

370537.name: Stasis
370537.description: Causes your next 3 helpful spells to be duplicated and stored in a time lock. You may reactivate Stasis any time within 30 sec to quickly unleash their magic.

370553.name: Tip the Scales
370553.description: Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.

370626.name: Gift of the Naaru
370626.description: Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

370665.name: Rescue
370665.description: Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.

370960.name: Emerald Communion
370960.description:
Commune with the Emerald Dream, restoring 20% health and 2% mana every 1 sec for 5 sec. Overhealing is transferred to an injured ally within 40 yds.

Castable while stunned, disoriented, incapacitated, or silenced.

370965.name: The Hunt
370965.description: Charge to your target, striking them for (664.5% of Attack Power) Chaos damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting (429% of Attack Power) Chaos damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

372048.name: Oppressing Roar
372048.description: Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec. [Overawe: Removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy]

373861.name: Temporal Anomaly
373861.description:
Send forward a vortex of temporal energy, absorbing [Spell Power * 6 * (1 + Versatility)] damage on you and any allies in its path. Absorption is reduced beyond 5 targets.

Applies Echo at 30% effectiveness on the first 5 allies it passes through.

374227.name: Zephyr
374227.description: Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

374251.name: Cauterizing Flame
374251.description: Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for (350% of Spell Power) upon removing any effect.

374968.name: Time Spiral
374968.description: Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

375087.name: Dragonrage
375087.description:
Erupt with draconic fury and exhale Pyres at 3 enemies within 25 yds.

For 18 sec, Essence Burst's chance to occur is increased to 100% [Tyranny: and you gain the maximum benefit of Mastery: Giantkiller regardless of targets' health].

375576.name: Divine Toll
375576.description:
Holy,  Protection
Instantly cast Holy Shock, Avenger's Shield, or Judgment on up to 5 targets within 30 yds.

 Retribution
Instantly cast Judgment on up to 5 targets within 30 yds.

Divine Toll's Judgment deals 100% increased damage.

375901.name: Mindgames
375901.description:
Assault an enemy's mind, dealing [(300% of Spell Power) * 100 / 100] Shadow damage and briefly reversing their perception of reality.

For 7 sec, the next [(Shadow spell power * 1050 / 100) * (1 + Versatility) * 100 / 100] damage they deal will heal their target, and the next [(Shadow spell power * 1050 / 100) * (1 + Versatility) * 100 / 100] healing they deal will damage their target. [ Shadow: Generates 10 Insanity.]

376079.name: Champion's Spear
376079.description:
Throw a spear at the target location, chaining all enemies in the area to the spear's location and dealing (239.25% of Attack Power) Physical damage instantly and an additional (326.25% of Attack Power) Physical damage over 6 sec. 

While the spear is active, activating this ability will cause you to leap to the spear, dealing (47% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all targets.

All damage dealt reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 10 Rage.

376743.name: Surge Forward
376743.description:
Flap forward a short distance, gaining speed.
Max 2 Charges

376744.name: Skyward Ascent
376744.description:
Flap upward, gaining height at the cost of some momentum.
Max 1 Charge

377509.name: Dream Projection
377509.description: Summon a flying projection of yourself that heals allies you pass through for (200% of Spell Power). Detonating your projection dispels all nearby allies of Magical effects, and heals for (900% of Spell Power) over 20 sec.

378081.name: Nature's Swiftness
378081.description: Your next healing or damaging Nature spell is instant cast and costs no mana.

378441.name: Time Stop
378441.description:
Freeze an ally's timestream for 5 sec. While frozen in time they are invulnerable, cannot act, and auras do not progress.

You may reactivate Time Stop to end this effect early.

378773.name: Greater Purge
378773.description: Purges the enemy target, removing 2 beneficial Magic effects.

381637.name: Atrophic Poison
381637.description: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by ( - 3 *- 1)% for 10 sec.

381664.name: Amplifying Poison
381664.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy, dealing (8.14% of Attack Power) Nature damage and applying Amplifying Poison for 12 sec. Envenom can consume 10 stacks of Amplifying Poison to deal 35% increased damage. Max 20 stacks.

381989.name: Keep It Rolling
381989.description: Increase the remaining duration of your active Roll the Bones combat enhancement by 30 sec.

382021.name: Earthliving Weapon
382021.description: Imbue your weapon with the element of Earth for 1 hour. Your Riptide, Healing Wave, and Chain Heal healing has a 20% chance to trigger Earthliving on the target, healing for (138.915% of Spell Power) over 6 sec.

383005.name: Chrono Loop
383005.description: Trap the enemy in a time loop for 5 sec. Afterwards, they are returned to their previous location and health. Cannot reduce an enemy's health below 20%.

383013.name: Poison Cleansing Totem
383013.description: Summons a totem at your feet that removes all Poison effects from a nearby party or raid member within 30 yards every 1.5 sec for 6 sec.

383121.name: Mass Polymorph
383121.description:
Transforms all enemies within 10 yards into sheep, wandering around incapacitated for 15 sec. While affected, the victims cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters.

383328.name: Final Verdict
383328.description:
Unleashes a powerful weapon strike that deals (404.408% of Attack Power) [Blades of Light: Holystrike / Holy] damage to an enemy target,

Final Verdict has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Judgment.

383762.name: Bitter Immunity
383762.description: Restores 20% health instantly and removes all diseases, poisons, and curses affecting you.

384090.name: Titanic Throw
384090.description:
Throws your weapon at the enemy, causing (35% of Attack Power) Physical damage to it and 5 nearby enemies. 

Generates high threat.

384100.name: Berserker Shout
384100.description:
Go berserk, removing and granting immunity to Fear, Sap, and Incapacitate effects for 6 sec.

Also remove fear effects from group members within 12 yds.

384110.name: Wrecking Throw
384110.description: Hurl your weapon at the enemy, causing (600% of Attack Power) Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

384318.name: Thunderous Roar
384318.description: Roar explosively, dealing (250.56% of Attack Power) Physical damage to enemies within 12 yds and cause them to bleed for (250.56% of Attack Power) physical damage over 8 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

384352.name: Doom Winds
384352.description:
Unleash a devastating storm around yourself, dealing (120% of Attack Power) Stormstrike damage every 1 sec to nearby enemies for 8 sec.

Increases your chance to activate Windfury Weapon by 100%, and the damage of Windfury Weapon by 20%.

385059.name: Odyn's Fury
385059.description:
Unleashes your power, dealing [(182.598% of Attack Power)% + (182.598% of Attack Power)% + (182.598% of Attack Power)% + (182.598% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage and an additional (520% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 4 sec to all enemies within 12 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Enrages you and generates 20 Rage.

385627.name: Kingsbane
385627.description:
Release a powerful poison from your weapons and inject it into your target, dealing (172.81% of Attack Power) Nature damage instantly and an additional (203% of Attack Power) Nature damage over 14 sec. 

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to a target affected by Kingsbane, Kingsbane damage increases by 20%, up to 1000%.

Awards 1 combo point.

385899.name: Soulburn
385899.description:
Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells.

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Drain Life: Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 sec. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

385952.name: Shield Charge
385952.description:
Charge to an enemy with your shield, granting you Shield Block and dealing (840% of Attack Power) Physical damage to it and (268.4% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all enemies within 10 yards.

Also stuns the primary target for 4 sec.

Generates 20 Rage.

386071.name: Disrupting Shout
386071.description: Taunts all enemies within 14 yds to attack you for 6 sec, interrupts all spellcasting within 14 yds and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 6 sec. Increases the threat you generate against the target by 800%.

386164.name: Battle Stance
386164.description:
A balanced combat state that increases the critical strike chance of your abilities by 3% and reduces the duration of movement impairing effects by 10%. 

Lasts until canceled.

386196.name: Berserker Stance
386196.description:
An aggressive combat state that increases the damage of your auto-attacks by 15% and reduces the duration of Fear, Sap and Incapacitate effects on you by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

386208.name: Defensive Stance
386208.description:
Arms,  Fury
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15% and all damage you deal by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

 Protection
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15%.

Lasts until canceled.

386951.name: Soul Swap
386951.description:
Copies your damage over time effects and Haunt from the target, preserving their duration.

Your next use of Soul Swap within 10 sec will exhale a copy damage of the effects onto a new target.

388615.name: Restoral
388615.description:
Heals all party and raid members within 40 yds for (5988.28% of Spell Power) and clears them of all harmful Poison and Disease effects. 

Castable while stunned.

Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

389539.name: Sentinel
389539.description:
Call upon the Light and gain 15 stacks of Divine Resolve, increasing your maximum health by 1% and reducing your damage taken by 2% per stack for 20 sec. After 5.0 sec, you will begin to lose 1 stack per second, but each 3 Holy Power spent will delay the loss of your next stack by 1 sec. [Sanctified Wrath: While active, your Judgment generates 1 additional Holy Power, your damage and healing is increased by 20%, and Hammer of Wrath may be cast on any target] [While active, your Judgment generates 1 additional Holy Power] [Avenging Wrath: While active, your damage and healing is increased by 20%, and Hammer of Wrath may be cast on any target]

Combines with Avenging Wrath.

389794.name: Snowdrift
389794.description:
Summon a strong Blizzard that surrounds you for 6 sec that slows enemies by 70% and deals (20% of Spell Power) Frost damage every 1 sec. 

Enemies that are caught in Snowdrift for 2 sec consecutively become Frozen in ice, stunned for 4 sec.

390163.name: Sigil of Spite
390163.description:
Place a demonic sigil at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Detonates to deal (692% of Attack Power) Chaos damage and shatter up to 3 Soul Fragments from enemies affected by the sigil. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

390386.name: Fury of the Aspects
390386.description:
Increases haste by 30% for all party and raid members for 40 sec.

Allies receiving this effect will become Exhausted and unable to benefit from Fury of the Aspects or similar effects again for 10 min.

390612.name: Frost Bomb
390612.description:
Places a Frost Bomb on the target. After 5 sec, the bomb explodes, dealing (931% of Spell Power) Frost damage to the target and (465.696% of Spell Power) Frost damage to all other enemies within 10 yards. All affected targets are slowed by 50% for 8 sec. 

If Frost Bomb is dispelled before it explodes, gain a charge of Brain Freeze.

391054.name: Intercession
391054.description: Petition the Light on the behalf of a fallen ally, restoring spirit to body and allowing them to reenter battle with 60% health and at least 20% mana.

391528.name: Convoke the Spirits
391528.description:
Call upon the spirits for an eruption of energy, channeling a rapid flurry of 16 / Ursoc's Guidance: 12 / Elune's Guidance: 12 / Astral Insight: 20 Druid spells and abilities over 4 sec. [Ashamane's Guidance: Chance to use an exceptional spell or ability is increased]

You will cast Wild Growth, Swiftmend, Moonfire, Wrath, Regrowth, Rejuvenation, Rake, and Thrash on appropriate nearby targets, favoring your current shapeshift form.

391622.name: Polymorph
391622.description:
Transforms the enemy into a duck, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

392966.name: Spell Block
392966.description: You are able to block spells for 30 sec.

392983.name: Strike of the Windlord
392983.description: Strike with both fists at all enemies in front of you, dealing [(1008% of Attack Power) + (504% of Attack Power)] Physical damage and reducing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec. Deals reduced damage to secondary targets.

394062.name: Rend
394062.description:
Wounds the target, causing (39.162% of Attack Power) Physical damage instantly and an additional (105.225% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 15 sec. [Thunder Clap: Thunder Clap affects 5 nearby targets with Rend.
]

395152.name: Ebon Might
395152.description:
Increase all damage dealing allies' primary stat by (8 + 0)% of your own and increase your own damage by 20% for 10 sec.

Ebon Might will split its effect when applied to more than 2 other allies.

Eruption, [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath], and your empower spells extend the duration of these effects.

395160.name: Eruption
395160.description: Cause a violent eruption beneath an enemy's feet, dealing (280% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage split between them and nearby enemies. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 1.0 sec]

395289.name: Portal: Valdrakken
395289.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Valdrakken.

396286.name: Upheaval
396286.description:
Gather earthen power beneath your enemy's feet and send them hurtling upwards, dealing (430% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage to the target and nearby enemies. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 2 sec]

Empowering expands the area of effect.

I:   3 yd radius.

II:  6 yd radius.

III: 9 yd radius.

399491.name: Sheilun's Gift
399491.description:
Draws in all nearby clouds of mist, healing the friendly target and up to 2 nearby allies for (416.96% of Spell Power) and an additional [(416.96% of Spell Power) * 5 / 100] per cloud absorbed.

A cloud of mist is generated every 8 sec while in combat.

400254.name: Raze
400254.description: Strike with the might of Ursoc, dealing (212.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage to your target and (115.6% of Attack Power) to all other enemies in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

403631.name: Breath of Eons
403631.description:
Fly to the targeted location, exposing a Temporal Wound on enemies in your path for 10 sec [Sands of Time: and granting Ebon Might for 5 sec / .]

Removes roots and grants immunity to movement impairing and loss of control effects while flying.

 Temporal Wound
15% of damage dealt by allies affected by Ebon Might is copied as additional Arcane damage to enemies after 10 sec.

Damage is reduced if Ebon Might affects more than 2 other allies.

403876.name: Divine Protection
403876.description: Reduces all damage you take by 20% for 8 sec [Shield of Vengeance: and casts Shield of Vengeance]. Usable while stunned.

404977.name: Time Skip
404977.description: Surge forward in time, causing your cooldowns to recover 1000% faster for 2 sec.

406087.name: Calm the Wolf
406087.description: Activate to control your worgen instincts and automatically assume human form when you leave combat.

406732.name: Spatial Paradox
406732.description:
Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.

407028.name: Sticky Tar Bomb
407028.description:
Throw a Sticky Tar Bomb that coats your target's weapons with tar, disarming them for 4 sec. 

After 4 sec, Sticky Tar Bomb explodes onto nearby enemies. Other enemies that are hit by the explosion are affected by Sticky Tar Bomb but this effect cannot spread further.

408233.name: Bestow Weyrnstone
408233.description:
Conjure a pair of Weyrnstones, one for your target ally and one for yourself. Only one ally may bear your Weyrnstone at a time.

A Weyrnstone can be activated by the bearer to transport them to the other Weyrnstone's location, if they are within 100 yds.

409293.name: Burrow
409293.description:
Burrow beneath the ground, becoming unattackable, removing movement impairing effects, and increasing your movement speed by 50% for 5 sec.

When the effect ends, enemies within 6 yards are knocked in the air and take [Spell Power * 6.6 * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage.

409311.name: Prescience
409311.description:
Grant an ally the gift of foresight, increasing their critical strike chance by 3% [Fate Mirror: and occasionally copying their damage and healing spells at 15% power]for 18 sec.

Affects the nearest ally within 25 yds, preferring damage dealers with their cooldowns active, if you do not have an ally targeted.

410126.name: Searing Glare
410126.description: Call upon the light to blind enemy players in a 25 yd cone, causing enemies to miss their spells and attacks for 4 sec.

410598.name: Soul Rip
410598.description:
Fracture the soul of up to 3 target players within 20 yds into the shadows, reducing their damage done by 25% and healing received by 25% for 8 sec. Souls are fractured up to 20 yds from the player's location.

Players can retrieve their souls to remove this effect.

412710.name: Timelessness
412710.description:
Enchant an ally to appear out of sync with the normal flow of time, reducing threat they generate by 30% for 1 hour. Less effective on tank-specialized allies. 

May only be placed on one target at a time.

414664.name: Mass Invisibility
414664.description:
You and your allies within 40 yards instantly become invisible for 12 sec. Taking any action will cancel the effect.

Does not affect allies in combat.

415091.name: Shield of the Righteous
415091.description: Slams enemies in front of you with your shield, causing (198% of Attack Power) Holy damage, and reducing the cooldown of Holy Shock by 2.0 sec and granting 3000 mana.

416250.name: Gift of the Naaru
416250.description: Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

421453.name: Ultimate Penitence
421453.description:
Ascend into the air and unleash a massive barrage of Penance bolts, causing [(190% of Spell Power)> * 24] Holy damage to enemies or [(445% of Spell Power)> * 24] healing to allies over 6 sec.

While ascended, gain a shield for 100% of your health. In addition, you are unaffected by knockbacks or crowd control effects.

426591.name: Goremaw's Bite
426591.description:
Lashes out at the target, inflicting (326.7% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and causing your next 3 finishing moves to cost no Energy.

Awards 3 combo points.

431044.name: Frostfire Bolt
431044.description: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing (259.4% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional (21.6% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage over 8 sec.

432459.name: Holy Bulwark
432459.description:
Protection
Will the Light to coalesce and become manifest as a Holy Armament, wielded by your friendly target.

 Holy Bulwark:

While wielding a Holy Bulwark, gain an absorb shield for 15.0% of your max health and an additional 2.0% every 2 sec. Lasts 20 sec.

Becomes Sacred Weapon after use.

 Holy
Will the Light to coalesce and become manifest as a Holy Armament, wielded by your friendly target.

 Holy Bulwark:

While wielding a Holy Bulwark, gain an absorb shield for 15.0% of your max health and an additional 2.0% every 2 sec. Lasts 20 sec.

Becomes Sacred Weapon after use.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

433568.name: Rite of Sanctification
433568.description:
Protection
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your armor by 5% and your primary stat by 2%.

Lasts 1 hour.

 Holy
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your armor by 5% and your primary stat by 5%.

Lasts 1 hour.

433583.name: Rite of Adjuration
433583.description:
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your Stamina by 3% and causing your Holy Power abilities to sometimes unleash a burst of healing around a target.

Lasts 1 hour.

436344.name: Azerite Surge
436344.description:
Draw upon your inner strength. Release to invoke the power of Azerite to harm your foes and aid your allies.

Empowering has the following effects:

I: Deals [Attack Power * 2 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Fire damage.

II: Heals allies for [Attack Power * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)].

III: Deals [Attack Power * 0.75 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] additional Fire damage to the highest health enemy.

436358.name: Demolish
436358.description:
Unleash a series of precise and powerful strikes against your target, dealing [(531.455% of Attack Power) + (531.455% of Attack Power) + (1232.36% of Attack Power)] damage to it, and (1232.36% of Attack Power) damage to enemies within 10 yds of it. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

While channeling Demolish, you take 10% less damage and are immune to stuns, knockbacks, and forced movement effects.

You can block, parry, dodge, and use certain defensive abilities while channeling Demolish.

439843.name: Reaper's Mark
439843.description:
Frost
Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing (312% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark.

Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing (40.4853% of Attack Power) damage per stack.

Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

 Blood
Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing (368.55% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark.

Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing (45.348% of Attack Power) damage per stack.

Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

440006.name: Purify Disease
440006.description: Removes all Disease effects from a friendly target.

440012.name: Cleanse Spirit
440012.description: Removes all Curse effects from a friendly target.

440013.name: Cleanse Toxins
440013.description: Cleanses a friendly target, removing all Poison and Disease effects..

440015.name: Remove Corruption
440015.description: Nullifies corrupting effects on the friendly target, removing all Curse and Poison effects.

443028.name: Celestial Conduit
443028.description:
Brewmaster,  Windwalker
The August Celestials empower you, causing you to radiate [(220% of Attack Power) * 5] Nature damage onto enemies and [(1100% of Spell Power) * 5] healing onto up to 5 injured allies within 15 yds over 4 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

You may move while channeling, but casting other healing or damaging spells cancels this effect.

 Mistweaver
The August Celestials empower you, causing you to radiate [(1100% of Spell Power) * 5] healing onto up to 5 injured allies and [(220% of Attack Power) * 5] Nature damage onto enemies within 20 yds over 4 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

You may move while channeling, but casting other healing or damaging spells cancels this effect.

446534.name: Portal: Dornogal
446534.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Dornogal.

450925.name: Lightning Volley
450925.description: The stormrook unleashes lightning bolts capable of seeking targets.

453785.name: Earthen Ordinant's Ramolith
453785.description: Summons the Earthen Ordinant's Ramolith, which serves as a mount.

460392.name: Polymorph
460392.description:
Transforms the enemy into a mosswool, wandering around incapacitated for 1 min. While affected, the victim cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters. [Glyph of Crittermorph: When critters are affected, can affect multiple targets, and has a duration of 1 day]

461063.name: Quiet Contemplation
461063.description: Draws upon your inner energy, restoring 100% of your maximum health and (96750 / 5 * 20) mana over 20 sec. Must remain seated during contemplation.

462620.name: Earthquake
462620.description:
Causes the earth within 8 yards of your target to tremble and break, dealing [6 * (63.25% of Spell Power)] Nature damage over 6 sec and has a 5% chance to knock the enemy down. Multiple uses of Earthquake may overlap.

This spell is cast at your target.

462757.name: Thunderstrike Ward
462757.description: Imbue your shield with the element of Lightning for 1 hour, giving Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning a chance to call down 2 Thunderstrikes on your target for (71.5% of Spell Power) Nature damage.

462854.name: Skyfury
462854.description:
Harness the fury of the Windlord to grant a target ally 2% Mastery and empower their auto attacks to have a 20% chance to instantly strike again for 1 hour.

If the target is in your party or raid, all party and raid members will be affected.

466904.name: Harrier's Cry
466904.description:
Your Eagle descends from the skies with a screech, giving the signal to attack.

Increases haste by 30% for all party and raid members for 40 sec.
