Allies receiving this effect will become Sated and unable to benefit from Harrier's Cry or similar effects again for 10 min.

466930.name: Black Arrow
466930.description: You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing (348.4% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and (400% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 8 sec. Only usable on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

467307.name: Rushing Wind Kick
467307.description:
Brewmaster,  Windwalker
Kick up a powerful gust of wind, dealing (179.75% of Attack Power) Nature damage in a 25 yd cone to enemies in front of you, split evenly among them. Damage is increased by 6% for each target hit, up to 30%.



 Mistweaver
Kick up a powerful gust of wind, dealing (179.75% of Attack Power) Nature damage in a 25 yd cone to enemies in front of you, split evenly among them. Damage is increased by 6% for each target hit, up to 30%.

Heals up to 5 allies affected by your heal over time effects for (500% of Spell Power).

470057.name: Voltaic Blaze
470057.description:
Elemental
Instantly shocks the target and 5 enemies within 10 yds with blazing thunder, applying Flame Shock and dealing (400% of Spell Power) Nature damage. Always critically strikes.

Generates 1 stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

 Enhancement
Instantly shocks the target and 5 enemies within 10 yds with blazing thunder, applying Flame Shock and dealing (400% of Spell Power) Nature damage. Always critically strikes.

Generates 1 stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

470411.name: Flame Shock
470411.description:
Sears the target with fire, causing (22.425% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage and then an additional (120.06% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage over 18 sec.

Flame Shock can be applied to a maximum of 6 targets.

 Elemental,  Enhancement
If Flame Shock is dispelled, a volcanic eruption wells up beneath the dispeller, exploding for (3175.2% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage and knocking them into the air

472433.name: Evangelism
472433.description: Immediately Power Word: Radiance your target at 150% effectiveness, and causes your next 2 casts of Power Word: Radiance to be instant cast with 40% reduced mana cost.

473662.name: Consume
473662.description:
Drain the essence from your target, dealing (196.7% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage.

Castable while moving.

Generates 8 Fury.

473728.name: Void Ray
473728.description:
Requires 100 Fury
Unleash a beam of concentrated void energy, dealing (20.25% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage and consuming 5 Fury every 0.2 sec.

Effect ends after 3 sec or upon reaching 0 Fury.

474421.name: Intimidation
474421.description:
Your Spotting Eagle descends from the skies, stunning your target for 5 sec. [Binding Shackles: Targets stunned by Intimidation deal 10% less damage to you for 8 sec after the effect ends]

This ability does not require line of sight when used against players.

474750.name: Symbiotic Relationship
474750.description: Form a bond with an ally. Your self-healing also heals your bonded ally for 10% of the amount healed. Your healing to your bonded ally also heals you for 8% of the amount healed.

1214467.name: Rain of Fire
1214467.description:
Calls down a rain of hellfire upon your target, dealing [(45.9162% of Spell Power) * 8] Fire damage over 8 sec to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at your target.

1214909.name: Roll the Bones
1214909.description:
Roll the dice of fate, providing a combat enhancement of random power for 30 sec.

1 set or better: Add 20% increased chance to gain Opportunity.

2 sets or better: Add increased combo point generation.

3 sets or better: Add 30% bonus to Restless Blades' effect.

Jackpot: Add 10% increased critical strike chance.

1217413.name: Slicing Winds
1217413.description:
Envelop yourself in razor-sharp winds, then lunge forward dealing (448% of Attack Power) Nature damage to enemies in your path. Damage reduced beyond 5 enemies.

Hold to increase lunge distance.

1217605.name: Void Metamorphosis
1217605.description:
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.

1226019.name: Reap
1226019.description:
Cut a hole in the fabric of reality, sending a concentrated bolt of cosmic matter towards your target, dealing (673.2% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage.

Reap gathers up to 4 nearby souls.

1227280.name: Tentacle Slam
1227280.description:
Summons a massive shadowy appendage to slam the ground, dealing (68.7926% of Spell Power) Shadow damage in front of you and 8 yds around your target.

Applies Vampiric Touch to up to 6 enemies, prioritizing ones without Vampiric Touch.

Generates 6 Insanity.

1229376.name: Single-Button Assistant
1229376.description:
Casts damaging abilities for use in combat, rotating through them based on priority.

The global cooldown of abilities used through the Single-Button Assistant is 25% longer.

1233429.name: Price of Progress
1233429.description: You sacrifice 1% of your health every 1 sec and in exchange you cannot be slowed below 90% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks. Lasts until canceled.

1233448.name: Dark Transformation
1233448.description:
Corrupt and evolve your Ghoul into a Monstrosity, greatly empowering its abilities for 15 sec.

Death Coil and Epidemic extends the duration of this effect by 1.0 sec.

1234195.name: Void Nova
1234195.description: Unleash an eruption of void energy, dealing (27.4816% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage and stunning your target and all nearby enemies for 2 sec.

1234796.name: Shift
1234796.description: Shift through the void, reappearing at your targeted destination.

1237885.name: Thorn Bloom
1237885.description:
Command powerful thorns to assault 8 enemies and heal 8 allies within 10 yds of the target area.

Enemies are dealt [Attack Power * 0.5 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Nature damage and an additional [(Attack Power * 0.125 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)) * 12] Nature damage over 12 sec. Allies are healed for [Attack Power * 0.65 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] and an additional [(Attack Power * 0.15 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)) * 12] over 12 sec.

1241059.name: Celestial Infusion
1241059.description: A strong herbal brew that coalesces purified chi escaping your body into a celestial guard, absorbing 30% of incoming damage, up to [(Attack Power * 22.68) * (1 + Versatility)] total.

1241462.name: Arcane Pulse
1241462.description:
A pulse of Arcane magic erupts from underneath your target, dealing (91% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to all enemies within 2 yds. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Each Arcane Charge increases damage by 60%, radius by 2 yds, and mana cost by 100%. [ Arcane (Level 10): Generates 1 Arcane Charge.]

1241937.name: Soul Immolation
1241937.description: Light your soul aflame, healing yourself for (4 * 6)% of your maximum health, generating 30 Fury and shattering 3 Soul Fragments over 5 sec.

1243807.name: Frantic Frenzy
1243807.description:
Unleash a furious frenzy, flickering to nearby targets in front of you 5 times and clawing all enemies around them for (15.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage and an additional [(31.08% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Awards 5 combo points.

1244088.name: Interpose
1244088.description: Run at high speed toward a target location near your allies, taking 30% of all damage dealt to allies within 3 yards for 8 sec or until you take at least [(0.2) * Total Health] damage from this effect.

1244258.name: Chomp
1244258.description:
Chomp your target, causing (900% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Chomp critical strikes deal 3 times normal damage.

Chomp can only be used when you fall below 30% Energy or for 2 seconds afterward.

1245412.name: Voidblade
1245412.description: Unleash your glaives and charge to your target, dealing (225% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage.

1246167.name: The Hunt
1246167.description: Charge to your target, striking them for (600% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting (382.5% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

1247227.name: Crimson Tempest
1247227.description:
Slash all enemies within 10 yds dealing (110% of Attack Power) damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Copy the longest Garrote and Rupture on the enemies you hit onto up to 2 other enemies. 

Awards 1 combo point.

1247378.name: Putrefy
1247378.description: Summon a Lesser Ghoul to strike the enemy for (234.9% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and have them explode for (121.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to nearby enemies.

1248829.name: Blizzard
1248829.description:
Ice shards pelt the target area, dealing [(44.28% of Spell Power) * 8] Frost damage over 12 sec and reducing movement speed by 50% for 3 sec.

This spell is cast at your target.

1249625.name: Zenith
1249625.description:
Chi costs are reduced by 1 and Blackout Kick reduces the cooldown of affected abilities by an additional 1 sec for 15 sec.

Activating Zenith resets the remaining cooldown on Rising Sun Kick.

1249658.name: Breath of Sindragosa
1249658.description:
Call upon Sindragosa's aid in battle for 8 sec, continuously dealing [(139.788% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Frost damage every 1 sec to enemies in a cone in front of you. Consuming Killing Machine or Rime increases the duration by 0.8 sec. Deals reduced damage to secondary targets.

Grants a charge of Empower Rune Weapon at the start and 2 Runes at the end.

1250646.name: Takedown
1250646.description:
You and your pet leap to your target and strike as one, dealing [(600% of Attack Power) + (1200% of Attack Power)] Physical damage. Your pet frees itself from roots when it leaps.

For the next 8 sec, the damage dealt by you and your pet is increased by 20%.

Generates 50 Focus.

1251417.name: Spectral Sight
1251417.description:
Allows you to see enemies and treasures through physical barriers, as well as enemies that are stealthed and invisible. Lasts 8 sec.

Loss of control effects disrupt the sight.

1251592.name: Flamefang Pitch
1251592.description:
Toss a fiery concoction that explodes violently upon reaching its destination, dealing (600% of Attack Power) Fire damage to enemies in its area. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

After landing, your Flamefang Pitch ignites nearby terrain, dealing [(50% of Attack Power) * 8] Fire damage to enemies in its area over 8 sec.

1252871.name: Red Moon
1252871.description: Channel the power of the enraged moon to deal (640% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to your target over 8 sec. Casting Mangle extends its duration by 1.0 sec and generates 8 Rage.

1253799.name: Sundering Roar
1253799.description:
Roar with earthshattering ferocity, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Physical damage, and resetting the cooldown of Thrash and allowing it to stack 5 additional times for 12 sec. 

When Sundering Roar ends, any excess stacks of Thrash immediately deal their remaining damage.

1254851.name: Flamestrike
1254851.description:
Calls down a pillar of fire on your target, burning all enemies within the area for (300% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

This spell is cast at your target.

1257052.name: Dark Harvest
1257052.description:
Consume the life force of each target afflicted by your damaging periodic effects, dealing [(839.552% of Spell Power) * (4)] Shadowflame damage over 3 sec.

Damage dealt by Dark Harvest heals you for 50% of damage done.

1259194.name: Portal: Silvermoon City
1259194.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Silvermoon City.

1259790.name: Unstable Affliction
1259790.description:
Afflicts the target with (302.36% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 8 sec. Multiple uses of this ability may overlap.

If dispelled, deals [(75.59% of Spell Power) * 5170 / 100] damage to the dispeller and silences them for 4 sec. This damage is increased by 15% per stack on the target.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies while afflicted.

1261193.name: Boomstick
1261193.description: Unload a series of 4 shotgun blasts 20 yds in front of you, dealing [(607.5% of Attack Power) * 4] Physical damage over 3 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

1261867.name: Heart of the Wild
1261867.description:
Restoration
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

 Balance,  Feral
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

Non-shapeshifted:
Empowered Wild Growth that heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for [(254.87% of Spell Power) * 600 / 100] over 7 sec.

 Guardian
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

Non-shapeshifted:
Empowered Wild Growth that heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for [(254.87% of Spell Power) * 600 / 100] over 7 sec.

Cat Form:
Unleash an empowered Feral Frenzy, clawing your target 5 times for [5 * (16.3% of Attack Power) * 1000 / 100] Physical damage and an additional [5 * 1000 / 100 * (32.67% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec. Awards 5 combo points.

Moonkin Form:
Call down waves of empowered falling stars upon enemies within 40 yds, dealing [54 * (25.3% of Spell Power)] Astral damage over 8 sec.

1263569.name: Abomination Limb
1263569.description:
Sprout an additional limb, pulling enemies further than 8 yds from you every 1 sec.  

The same enemy can only be pulled once every 4 sec.

1263824.name: Consumption
1263824.description:
Empower the runes in your weapon, reducing the damage you take over the duration and unleashing a devastating attack that deals (625.1% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and consumes up to 75% of your Blood Plague instantly from enemies in front of you.

I: Consumes up to 25% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 5% and an additional 8 sec after empowering.

II: Consumes up to 50% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 10% and an additional 4 sec after empowering.

III: Consumes up to 75% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 15% and an additional 2 sec after empowering.

1264359.name: Wild Thrash
1264359.description:
Command your pet to thrash all enemies within 10 yds, dealing (191% of Attack Power) Physical damage to them. Damage is increased by 200% if Wild Thrash hits 2 or more enemies.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

1271802.name: Blight of Tongues
1271802.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

1276452.name: Grimoire: Imp Lord
1276452.description:
Summons an Imp Lord to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will remove 1 harmful effect from you when summoned. 

Transforms into Singe Magic while on cooldown.

1276467.name: Grimoire: Fel Ravager
1276467.description:
Summons a Fel Ravager to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will purge 1 beneficial magic effect from an enemy.

Turns into Devour Magic while on cooldown.

1276672.name: Summon Doomguard
1276672.description:
Summons a Doomguard to assist you in combat for 12 sec. Consuming a Demonic Core reduces the cooldown of Summon Doomguard by 3 sec.

 Doom Bolt Volley
Sends a volley of malefic bolts at 5 enemies within 40 yds, inflicting (413.929% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to each target.

1277297.name: Ignore Pain
1277297.description: Fight through the pain, ignoring 50% of damage taken for 12 sec or until [0 * (1 + Versatility)] damage has been prevented.

1277933.name: Preparation
1277933.description: Immediately reset the cooldowns of Adrenaline Rush, Between the Eyes, Blade Flurry, Blade Rush, and Killing Spree.

1289789.name: Battle Visage
1289789.description: Activate to automatically assume your Visage whenever you are not casting draconic spells such as Fire Breath and Soar.

1291636.name: Temporal Barrier
1291636.description: Send out a ripple of temporal energy, absorbing 0 damage and applying Echo at 30% effectiveness on your target and up to 4 allies within 40 yds.
